<script>
/**
 * State Management Module
 * Manages the global application state for the component editor
 */

const editorState = {
    dom: {},
    output_methods_cache: [],
    input_methods_cache: [],
    isDirty: false,
    isInitializing: false, // Flag to prevent dirty state during initialization
    _initTimeoutId: null, // Tracks the 300ms timeout that clears isInitializing
    hasError: false,
    pendingDtoRun: null,
    currentEditingDto: null,
    activeDtoRun: null, // Currently active/running DTO (for highlighting)
    defaultDto: null, // Default DTO extracted from component's mock data
    pendingVariantSwitch: null, // Stores variant to switch to after confirmation
    currentTags: [],
    availableTags: [], // All available tags that can be selected
    ai_fix_prompt: "",
    componentId: "",
    componentName: "",
    componentDescription: "",
    versions: [],
    components: [],
    selectedVariant: null,
    activeTab: null,
    firstEnvName: "YYY",
    firstEnvId: "",
    releases: [],
    isNewComponent: false,
    copiedFrom: null, // source component ID if this is an implementor copy
    mode: 'component', // 'playground' | 'component' - editor mode
    hasConnected: false, // whether the component has been connected to a host app
    pendingConnect: false, // true when Connect was clicked on a new component, waiting for save + re-init
    /**
     * TEMPORARY MVP: Auth token from host dashboard
     * This is forwarded to myop-agent iframe for authentication.
     * TODO: Replace with Option B (backend session exchange) for production.
     * See: myop-agent/authOptionB.md
     */
    auth: null
};

// Monaco Editor instance (global references)
let monacoEditorInstance = null;
let monacoEditorWrapper = null;

// Export to window for global access
window.editorState = editorState;
window.monacoEditorInstance = monacoEditorInstance;
window.monacoEditorWrapper = monacoEditorWrapper;


/**
 * Helper Utilities Module
 * Common utility functions used throughout the application
 */

/**
 * Safely clones an object, avoiding circular references and non-serializable objects
 * @param {*} obj - Object to clone
 * @param {number} depth - Current recursion depth
 * @param {number} maxDepth - Maximum recursion depth
 * @param {WeakSet} seen - Set of already visited objects
 * @returns {*} Cloned object
 */
function safeClone(obj, depth = 0, maxDepth = 20, seen = new WeakSet()) {
    try {
        // Primitives and nullish values are always safe to return regardless of depth
        if (obj === null || obj === undefined) return obj;
        const objType = typeof obj;
        if (objType !== 'object' && objType !== 'function') return obj;
        if (objType === 'function') return undefined;

        // Depth limit only applies to objects/arrays (circular refs already caught by seen)
        if (depth > maxDepth) return null;

        try {
            if (obj instanceof Window || obj instanceof HTMLElement || obj instanceof Node ||
                obj instanceof Event || obj.constructor?.name === 'Window' ||
                obj.constructor?.name === 'HTMLDocument' || obj.nodeType !== undefined ||
                obj === window || obj === document) {
                return undefined;
            }
        } catch (e) {
            return undefined;
        }

        if (seen.has(obj)) return null;
        seen.add(obj);

        if (obj instanceof Date) return obj.toISOString();
        if (obj instanceof RegExp) return obj.toString();

        if (Array.isArray(obj)) {
            const clonedArray = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < obj.length; i++) {
                try {
                    const clonedItem = safeClone(obj[i], depth + 1, maxDepth, seen);
                    if (clonedItem !== undefined) clonedArray.push(clonedItem);
                } catch (e) {
                    console.warn(`Skipping array item ${i} due to error:`, e);
                }
            }
            return clonedArray;
        }

        const cloned = {};
        const keys = Object.keys(obj);
        for (let i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
            const key = keys[i];
            try {
                if (key.startsWith('__') || key === 'constructor' || key === 'prototype') continue;
                const value = obj[key];
                const clonedValue = safeClone(value, depth + 1, maxDepth, seen);
                if (clonedValue !== undefined) cloned[key] = clonedValue;
            } catch (e) {
                console.warn(`Skipping property ${key} due to error:`, e);
            }
        }
        return cloned;
    } catch (e) {
        console.warn('safeClone error:', e);
        return null;
    }
}

/**
 * Capitalizes the first letter of a string
 * @param {string} s - String to capitalize
 * @returns {string} Capitalized string
 */
function _capitalize(s) {
    if (!s || typeof s !== 'string') return '';
    return s.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + s.slice(1);
}

// Export to window for global access
window.safeClone = safeClone;
window._capitalize = _capitalize;


/**
 * UI Utilities Module
 * Functions for managing UI state, notifications, tooltips, and button states
 */

/**
 * Marks the editor state as dirty (unsaved changes)
 */
function _markAsDirty() {
    // Don't mark as dirty during initialization (prevents false positives from programmatic changes)
    if (window.editorState.isInitializing) {
        return;
    }

    // Check if the current variant is locked (has releases)
    const hasReleases = window.editorState.releases && window.editorState.releases.length > 0;

    // Auto-fork: if variant has releases, create a new unpublished variant
    if (hasReleases) {
        if (typeof window._forkFromPublishedVariant === 'function') {
            window._forkFromPublishedVariant();
        }
        return;
    }

    if (!window.editorState.isDirty) {
        window.editorState.isDirty = true;
        _updateButtonStates();

        // Notify host about unsaved changes
        if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
            const payload = safeClone({
                isDirty: true,
                component_name: window.editorState.componentName,
                version_id: window.editorState.selectedVariant?.id,
                version_name: window.editorState.selectedVariant?.name
            });
            window.myop_cta_handler('unsaved_changes', payload);
        }
    }
}

/**
 * Shows a notification toast message
 * @param {string} message - Message to display
 */
function _showNotification(message) {
    const toast = document.getElementById('notification-toast');
    if (!toast) return;

    toast.textContent = message;
    toast.classList.add('show');

    // Hide after 3 seconds
    setTimeout(() => {
        toast.classList.remove('show');
    }, 3000);
}

/**
 * Updates the state of Save and Publish buttons based on editor state
 */
function _updateButtonStates() {
    const dom = window.editorState.dom;

    // Check if component or variant names are empty/untitled
    const isComponentNameEmpty = !window.editorState.componentName ||
        window.editorState.componentName.trim() === '' ||
        window.editorState.componentName === 'Untitled component...';
    const isVariantNameEmpty = !window.editorState.selectedVariant ||
        !window.editorState.selectedVariant.name ||
        window.editorState.selectedVariant.name.trim() === '' ||
        window.editorState.selectedVariant.name === 'Untitled variant...';

    // Check if the current variant is locked (has releases)
    const hasReleases = window.editorState.releases && window.editorState.releases.length > 0;

    // Update Save button
    dom.btnSaveTop.disabled = !window.editorState.isDirty || !window.editorState.selectedVariant || isComponentNameEmpty || isVariantNameEmpty;

    // Set tooltip for save button
    if (isComponentNameEmpty) {
        dom.btnSaveTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Add component name first');
    } else if (isVariantNameEmpty) {
        dom.btnSaveTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Add variant name first');
    } else if (!window.editorState.selectedVariant) {
        dom.btnSaveTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Select a variant first');
    } else if (!window.editorState.isDirty) {
        dom.btnSaveTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'No changes to save');
    } else {
        dom.btnSaveTop.removeAttribute('data-tooltip');
    }

    // Update Publish button
    const canPublish = !window.editorState.isDirty && !window.editorState.hasError && window.editorState.selectedVariant && !hasReleases && !isComponentNameEmpty && !isVariantNameEmpty;
    dom.btnPublishTop.disabled = !canPublish;

    // Set tooltip for publish button
    if (isComponentNameEmpty) {
        dom.btnPublishTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Add component name first');
    } else if (isVariantNameEmpty) {
        dom.btnPublishTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Add variant name first');
    } else if (!window.editorState.selectedVariant) {
        dom.btnPublishTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Select a variant first');
    } else if (hasReleases) {
        dom.btnPublishTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Locked after publish');
    } else if (window.editorState.isDirty) {
        dom.btnPublishTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Save changes first');
    } else if (window.editorState.hasError) {
        dom.btnPublishTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Fix errors first');
    } else {
        dom.btnPublishTop.removeAttribute('data-tooltip');
    }

    // Update publish button text based on state
    if (hasReleases) {
        dom.btnPublishTop.textContent = 'Published';
        dom.btnPublishTop.classList.add('published');
    } else {
        // In playground mode, just show "Publish" without the environment name
        dom.btnPublishTop.textContent = window.editorState.mode === 'playground'
            ? 'Publish'
            : `Publish to ${window.editorState.firstEnvName || 'Environment'}`;
        dom.btnPublishTop.classList.remove('published');
    }
}

/**
 * Updates the read-only state of the Monaco editor
 */
function _updateEditorReadOnlyState() {
    // Check if the current variant is marked as readonly (playground mode)
    const isReadonlyVariant = window.editorState.selectedVariant && window.editorState.selectedVariant.readonly === true;

    // Update Monaco editor read-only state (only for readonly variants, not published ones — those auto-fork)
    if (window.monacoEditorInstance) {
        window.monacoEditorInstance.updateOptions({
            readOnly: isReadonlyVariant
        });
    }
}

// Export to window for global access
window._markAsDirty = _markAsDirty;
window._showNotification = _showNotification;
window._updateButtonStates = _updateButtonStates;
window._updateEditorReadOnlyState = _updateEditorReadOnlyState;


/**
 * Monaco Editor Module
 * Handles Monaco Editor initialization and configuration
 */

// Activate fallback textarea when Monaco fails to load
function _activateFallbackEditor() {
    var container = document.getElementById('code-editor');
    var fallbackTextarea = document.getElementById('code-editor-fallback');
    if (!fallbackTextarea || !container) return;

    container.style.display = 'none';
    fallbackTextarea.style.display = 'block';
    fallbackTextarea.style.width = '100%';
    fallbackTextarea.style.height = '100%';
    fallbackTextarea.style.tabSize = '2';

    monacoEditorWrapper = {
        get value() {
            return fallbackTextarea.value || '';
        },
        set value(newValue) {
            fallbackTextarea.value = newValue || '';
        },
        oninput: null,
        addEventListener: function(event, handler) {
            if (event === 'input') {
                fallbackTextarea.addEventListener('input', handler);
            }
        }
    };

    fallbackTextarea.addEventListener('input', function() {
        if (window._markAsDirty) window._markAsDirty();
        if (window.notifyMyopAgentOfCodeChange) window.notifyMyopAgentOfCodeChange();
        if (window.renderPreview) window.renderPreview();
        if (monacoEditorWrapper.oninput) monacoEditorWrapper.oninput();
    });

    if (window.editorState && window.editorState.dom) {
        window.editorState.dom.codeEditor = monacoEditorWrapper;
    }

    if (window.__monacoReadyCallback) {
        window.__monacoReadyCallback();
        window.__monacoReadyCallback = null;
    }

    // Editor ready — retry deferred agent init
    if (typeof window.sendInitToMyopAgent === 'function') {
        window.sendInitToMyopAgent();
    }

    console.warn('[editor] Monaco failed to load, using fallback textarea editor');
}

// Initialize Monaco Editor when DOM is ready
window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        // Check if AMD loader (require) is available — if the CDN script failed to load, it won't be
        if (typeof require === 'undefined' || typeof require.config !== 'function') {
            console.error('[editor] Monaco AMD loader not available (CDN script failed to load)');
            _activateFallbackEditor();
            return;
        }

        require.config({ paths: { 'vs': 'https://unpkg.com/monaco-editor@0.50.0/min/vs' }});
        require(['vs/editor/editor.main'], function() {
            const container = document.getElementById('code-editor');
            const fallbackTextarea = document.getElementById('code-editor-fallback');
            const initialCode = fallbackTextarea.value || '';

            // Define custom light theme with visible selection
            monaco.editor.defineTheme('myCustomTheme', {
                base: 'vs',
                inherit: true,
                rules: [
                    { token: '', foreground: '000000' },
                    { token: 'comment', foreground: '008000', fontStyle: 'italic' },
                    { token: 'keyword', foreground: '0000FF', fontStyle: 'bold' },
                    { token: 'string', foreground: 'A31515' },
                    { token: 'number', foreground: '098658' },
                    { token: 'tag', foreground: '800000' },
                    { token: 'attribute.name', foreground: 'FF0000' },
                    { token: 'attribute.value', foreground: '0000FF' }
                ],
                colors: {
                    'editor.background': '#FFFFFF',
                    'editor.foreground': '#000000',
                    'editor.lineHighlightBackground': '#F0F0F0',
                    'editor.selectionBackground': '#ADD6FF',
                    'editor.inactiveSelectionBackground': '#E5EBF1',
                    'editor.selectionHighlightBackground': '#ADD6FF80',
                    'editorCursor.foreground': '#000000',
                    'editorLineNumber.foreground': '#237893',
                    'editorLineNumber.activeForeground': '#0B216F',
                    'editorIndentGuide.background': '#FFFFFF',
                    'editorIndentGuide.activeBackground': '#FFFFFF',
                    'editorBracketMatch.background': '#FFFFFF',
                    'editorBracketMatch.border': '#FFFFFF',
                    'editorBracketPairGuide.background1': '#FFFFFF',
                    'editorBracketPairGuide.background2': '#FFFFFF',
                    'editorBracketPairGuide.background3': '#FFFFFF',
                    'editorBracketPairGuide.background4': '#FFFFFF',
                    'editorBracketPairGuide.background5': '#FFFFFF',
                    'editorBracketPairGuide.background6': '#FFFFFF',
                    'editorBracketPairGuide.activeBackground1': '#FFFFFF',
                    'editorBracketPairGuide.activeBackground2': '#FFFFFF',
                    'editorBracketPairGuide.activeBackground3': '#FFFFFF',
                    'editorBracketPairGuide.activeBackground4': '#FFFFFF',
                    'editorBracketPairGuide.activeBackground5': '#FFFFFF',
                    'editorBracketPairGuide.activeBackground6': '#FFFFFF'
                }
            });

            monacoEditorInstance = monaco.editor.create(container, {
                value: initialCode,
                language: 'html',
                theme: 'myCustomTheme',
                automaticLayout: true,
                minimap: { enabled: true },
                fontSize: 12,
                fontFamily: "'SF Mono', 'Monaco', 'Cascadia Code', 'Courier New', Courier, monospace",
                lineHeight: 1.6,
                scrollBeyondLastLine: false,
                wordWrap: 'on',
                wrappingIndent: 'indent',
                folding: true,
                foldingStrategy: 'auto',
                showFoldingControls: 'always',
                quickSuggestions: {
                    other: true,
                    comments: false,
                    strings: true
                },
                suggestOnTriggerCharacters: true,
                parameterHints: { enabled: true },
                autoClosingBrackets: 'always',
                autoClosingQuotes: 'always',
                formatOnPaste: true,
                formatOnType: true,
                find: {
                    addExtraSpaceOnTop: false,
                    autoFindInSelection: 'never',
                    seedSearchStringFromSelection: 'always'
                },
                guides: {
                    indentation: false,
                    bracketPairs: false,
                    bracketPairsHorizontal: false,
                    highlightActiveIndentation: false
                }
            });

            // Update window.monacoEditorInstance for extension access
            window.monacoEditorInstance = monacoEditorInstance;

            // Detect and set language based on content
            function detectAndSetLanguage(code) {
                let detectedLanguage = 'html';

                // Check if it's primarily JavaScript
                if (!code.includes('<html') && !code.includes('<div') &&
                    (code.includes('function') || code.includes('const ') ||
                        code.includes('let ') || code.includes('var '))) {
                    detectedLanguage = 'javascript';
                }
                // Check if it's primarily CSS
                else if (!code.includes('<') &&
                    (code.includes('{') && code.includes('}') &&
                        (code.match(/[\w-]+\s*:\s*[^;]+;/) || code.includes('@media')))) {
                    detectedLanguage = 'css';
                }

                const model = monacoEditorInstance.getModel();
                if (model) {
                    monaco.editor.setModelLanguage(model, detectedLanguage);
                }
            }

            // Set initial language
            detectAndSetLanguage(initialCode);

            // Auto-detect language on content change
            monacoEditorInstance.onDidChangeModelContent(function() {
                const code = monacoEditorInstance.getValue();
                detectAndSetLanguage(code);
            });

            monacoEditorWrapper = {
                get value() {
                    return monacoEditorInstance ? monacoEditorInstance.getValue() : '';
                },
                set value(newValue) {
                    if (monacoEditorInstance) {
                        monacoEditorInstance.setValue(newValue || '');
                    }
                },
                oninput: null,
                addEventListener: function(event, handler) {
                    if (event === 'input' && monacoEditorInstance) {
                        monacoEditorInstance.onDidChangeModelContent(handler);
                    }
                }
            };

            // Track user-initiated changes vs programmatic changes
            let isSettingValue = false;

            // Override setValue to track programmatic changes
            const originalSetValue = monacoEditorInstance.setValue;
            monacoEditorInstance.setValue = function(value) {
                isSettingValue = true;
                originalSetValue.call(monacoEditorInstance, value);
                isSettingValue = false;
            };

            monacoEditorInstance.onDidChangeModelContent(function(e) {
                // Only trigger dirty state and agent notification for user-initiated changes
                if (!isSettingValue) {
                    if (window._markAsDirty) {
                        window._markAsDirty();
                    }
                    // Notify myop-agent of code changes
                    if (window.notifyMyopAgentOfCodeChange) {
                        window.notifyMyopAgentOfCodeChange();
                    }
                }

                // Always render preview for all changes (user and programmatic)
                if (window.renderPreview) {
                    window.renderPreview();
                }

                // Always call the oninput handler if set
                if (monacoEditorWrapper.oninput) {
                    monacoEditorWrapper.oninput(e);
                }
            });

            monacoEditorInstance.onDidPaste(function(e) {
                if (window._markAsDirty) {
                    window._markAsDirty();
                }
                if (window.renderPreview) {
                    window.renderPreview();
                }
            });

            if (window.editorState && window.editorState.dom && window.editorState.dom.codeEditor) {
                window.editorState.dom.codeEditor = monacoEditorWrapper;
            }

            if (window.__monacoReadyCallback) {
                window.__monacoReadyCallback();
                window.__monacoReadyCallback = null;
            }

            // Monaco is ready — if agent init was deferred (no HTML at the time),
            // retry now that the editor has content
            if (typeof window.sendInitToMyopAgent === 'function') {
                window.sendInitToMyopAgent();
            }

            // Auto-switch to preview mode if component is loaded (not empty state)
            setTimeout(() => {
                const code = monacoEditorInstance.getValue().trim();
                const componentName = window.editorState?.componentName;
                const isEmptyState = !componentName || componentName === 'Untitled component...' || !code;

                if (!isEmptyState && typeof window.showTab === 'function') {
                    window.showTab('preview');
                }
            }, 100);

        }, function(err) {
            // AMD require error callback — Monaco modules failed to load from CDN
            console.error('[editor] Monaco editor modules failed to load:', err);
            _activateFallbackEditor();
        });
    });



/**
 * Components & Variants Management Module
 * Handles component and variant list management, switching, and UI updates
 */

/**
 * Gets the current variant name
 * @returns {string} Current variant name
 */
function _getCurrentVariantName() {
    return window.editorState.selectedVariant ? window.editorState.selectedVariant.name : '';
}

/**
 * Refreshes the variant list dropdown
 */
function _refreshVariantList() {
    const list = window.editorState.dom.variantList;
    list.innerHTML = '';

    // Show latest variants first (reverse order)
    const sortedVersions = [...window.editorState.versions].reverse();

    sortedVersions.forEach(version => {
        const item = document.createElement('div');
        item.className = 'modal-dropdown-item';

        // Highlight the currently selected variant
        if (window.editorState.selectedVariant && version.id === window.editorState.selectedVariant.id) {
            item.classList.add('selected');
        }

        // Create text span for variant name
        const nameSpan = document.createElement('span');
        nameSpan.className = 'variant-item-name';
        nameSpan.textContent = version.name;
        item.appendChild(nameSpan);

        // Add published badge if variant has releases or is published - only in component mode
        if ((version.has_releases || version.published) && window.editorState.mode !== 'playground') {
            const badge = document.createElement('span');
            badge.className = 'published-badge';
            badge.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Read only - previously published');
            badge.innerHTML = '<svg viewBox="0 0 8 8" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M2 4L3.5 5.5L6 2.5" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>';
            item.appendChild(badge);
        }

        // Add duplicate (copy) button - appears on hover
        const duplicateBtn = document.createElement('button');
        duplicateBtn.className = 'variant-duplicate-btn';
        duplicateBtn.innerHTML = '<svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M5 6C5 5.44772 5.44772 5 6 5H14C14.5523 5 15 5.44772 15 6V14C15 14.5523 14.5523 15 14 15H6C5.44772 15 5 14.5523 5 14V6Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2"/><path d="M11 5V2C11 1.44772 10.5523 1 10 1H2C1.44772 1 1 1.44772 1 2V10C1 10.5523 1.44772 11 2 11H5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2"/></svg>';
        duplicateBtn.onclick = (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();

            // Create a duplicate of the variant
            const newVariant = {
                id: 'v' + Date.now(),
                name: version.name + ' copy',
                published: false,
                has_releases: false,
                code: version.code || '',
                description: version.description || ''
            };

            // Add to versions array
            window.editorState.versions.push(newVariant);

            // Select the new variant
            window.editorState.selectedVariant = newVariant;
            window.editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.value = newVariant.name;
            window.editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.remove('empty-state');
            window.editorState.dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.value = newVariant.description;

            // Update the code editor with the duplicated code
            if (window.editorState.dom.codeEditor) {
                window.editorState.dom.codeEditor.value = newVariant.code;
            }

            // Close dropdown
            window.editorState.dom.variantDropdown.classList.remove('show');

            // Mark as dirty since we created a new variant
            window.editorState.isDirty = true;

            // Refresh UI
            _refreshVariantList();
            _updateButtonStates();
            _updateEditorReadOnlyState();
            if (window.renderPreview) {
                window.renderPreview();
            }

            // Notify host about the duplication
            if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                const payload = safeClone({
                    original_version_id: version.id,
                    original_version_name: version.name,
                    new_version_id: newVariant.id,
                    new_version_name: newVariant.name
                });
                window.myop_cta_handler('version_duplicate', payload);
            }
        };
        item.appendChild(duplicateBtn);

        // Add delete (trash) button on the right - for all variants including published
        const deleteBtn = document.createElement('button');
        deleteBtn.className = 'variant-delete-btn disabled';
        deleteBtn.innerHTML = '<svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M2 4H3.33333H14" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M5.33337 4.00001V2.66668C5.33337 2.31305 5.47385 1.97392 5.72390 1.72387C5.97395 1.47382 6.31309 1.33334 6.66671 1.33334H9.33337C9.687 1.33334 10.0261 1.47382 10.2762 1.72387C10.5262 1.97392 10.6667 2.31305 10.6667 2.66668V4.00001M12.6667 4.00001V13.3333C12.6667 13.687 12.5262 14.0261 12.2762 14.2761C12.0261 14.5262 11.687 14.6667 11.3334 14.6667H4.66671C4.31309 14.6667 3.97395 14.5262 3.7239 14.2761C3.47385 14.0261 3.33337 13.687 3.33337 13.3333V4.00001H12.6667Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>';
        deleteBtn.onclick = (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            // Emit delete event to host
            if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                const payload = safeClone({ version_id: version.id, version_name: version.name });
                window.myop_cta_handler('version_delete', payload);
            }
        };
        item.appendChild(deleteBtn);

        item.onclick = () => {
            // If there are unsaved changes, store pending variant and send event to host
            if (window.editorState.isDirty) {
                window.editorState.pendingVariantSwitch = version;
                window.editorState.dom.variantDropdown.classList.remove('show');

                // Send version_selected event to host
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    const payload = safeClone({ version_id: version.id });
                    window.myop_cta_handler('version_selected', payload);
                }
                return;
            }

            // No unsaved changes - switch immediately
            window.editorState.selectedVariant = version;
            window.editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.textContent = version.name;

            // Apply empty-state class if variant name is untitled
            if (version.name === 'Untitled variant...') {
                window.editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.add('empty-state');
            } else {
                window.editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.remove('empty-state');
            }

            window.editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.setAttribute('contenteditable', 'false');
            window.editorState.dom.variantDropdown.classList.remove('show');

            _refreshVariantList();
            _updateButtonStates();
            _updateEditorReadOnlyState();

            if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                const payload = safeClone({ version_id: version.id });
                window.myop_cta_handler('version_selected', payload);
            }
        };
        list.appendChild(item);
    });

}

/**
 * Refreshes the component list dropdown
 */
function _refreshComponentList() {
    const list = window.editorState.dom.componentList;
    if (!list) return;

    list.innerHTML = '';

    const currentItem = document.createElement('div');
    currentItem.className = 'modal-dropdown-item selected';
    currentItem.textContent = window.editorState.componentName;
    currentItem.onclick = () => {
        window.editorState.dom.componentDropdown.classList.remove('show');
    };
    list.appendChild(currentItem);

    // Use components list from host application
    const components = window.editorState.components || [];
    components.forEach(component => {
        if (component.id !== window.editorState.componentId) {
            const item = document.createElement('div');
            item.className = 'modal-dropdown-item';
            item.textContent = component.name;
            item.onclick = () => {
                window.editorState.dom.componentDropdown.classList.remove('show');
                // Call CTA to switch component in host application
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    const safePayload = safeClone({
                        component_id: component.id,
                        component_name: component.name
                    });
                    window.myop_cta_handler('component_selected', safePayload);
                }
            };
            list.appendChild(item);
        }
    });
}

// Export to window for global access
window._getCurrentVariantName = _getCurrentVariantName;
window._refreshVariantList = _refreshVariantList;
window._refreshComponentList = _refreshComponentList;


/**
 * Tags Management Module
 * Handles tag creation, deletion, and rendering with dropdown selection
 */

(function() {
    let isDropdownOpen = false;

    // DOM elements (will be initialized when DOM is ready)
    let tagsContainer, inputWrapper, tagInput, dropdown, dropdownList, emptyState, noMatches, selectedTagsContainer;

    /**
     * Initialize DOM references
     */
    function initTagsDom() {
        tagsContainer = document.getElementById('tagsContainer');
        inputWrapper = document.getElementById('inputWrapper');
        tagInput = document.getElementById('tagInput');
        dropdown = document.getElementById('tagsDropdown');
        dropdownList = document.getElementById('dropdownList');
        emptyState = document.getElementById('emptyState');
        noMatches = document.getElementById('noMatches');
        selectedTagsContainer = document.getElementById('selectedTags');
    }

    /**
     * Check if a tag is currently selected
     * @param {string} tagId - Tag ID to check
     * @returns {boolean}
     */
    function isTagSelected(tagId) {
        const state = window.editorState;
        return state.currentTags.some(t => (typeof t === 'object' ? t.id : t) === tagId);
    }

    /**
     * Check if a tag with the given name already exists
     * @param {string} name - Tag name to check
     * @returns {boolean}
     */
    function doesTagExist(name) {
        const state = window.editorState;
        const normalized = name.trim().toLowerCase();
        return (state.availableTags || []).some(t => t.name.toLowerCase() === normalized);
    }

    /**
     * Escape HTML to prevent XSS
     * @param {string} text - Text to escape
     * @returns {string}
     */
    function escapeHtml(text) {
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.textContent = text;
        return div.innerHTML;
    }

    /**
     * Renders the selected tags as chips
     */
    function _renderTags() {
        if (!selectedTagsContainer) return;

        const state = window.editorState;
        const selectedTags = state.currentTags || [];

        selectedTagsContainer.innerHTML = selectedTags.map(tag => {
            const tagName = typeof tag === 'object' ? tag.name : tag;
            const tagId = typeof tag === 'object' ? tag.id : tag;
            return `
                <div class="tag-chip" data-tag-id="${escapeHtml(tagId)}">
                    <span class="tag-chip-text">${escapeHtml(tagName)}</span>
                    <span class="tag-chip-remove" data-remove-id="${escapeHtml(tagId)}">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 10 10" fill="none">
                            <path d="M2 2L8 8M8 2L2 8" stroke="#3e3d3e" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
                        </svg>
                    </span>
                </div>
            `;
        }).join('');

        // Attach remove handlers
        selectedTagsContainer.querySelectorAll('.tag-chip-remove').forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                const tagId = btn.dataset.removeId;
                _removeTag(tagId);
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Renders the dropdown list with available tags
     * @param {string} filter - Filter string for searching
     */
    function renderDropdownList(filter = '') {
        if (!dropdownList || !emptyState || !noMatches) return;

        const state = window.editorState;
        const availableTags = state.availableTags || [];
        const normalizedFilter = filter.trim().toLowerCase();
        let visibleCount = 0;

        // Check if there are any tags at all
        const hasNoTags = availableTags.length === 0;

        // Show empty state if no tags exist
        emptyState.classList.toggle('visible', hasNoTags);

        // If no tags, don't render the list
        if (hasNoTags) {
            dropdownList.innerHTML = '';
            noMatches.classList.remove('visible');
            return;
        }

        const items = availableTags.map(tag => {
            const matchesFilter = !normalizedFilter || tag.name.toLowerCase().includes(normalizedFilter);
            const isSelected = isTagSelected(tag.id);

            if (matchesFilter) visibleCount++;

            return `
                <div class="dropdown-item ${matchesFilter ? '' : 'hidden'}" data-tag-id="${escapeHtml(tag.id)}">
                    <div class="checkbox ${isSelected ? 'checked' : ''}">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 10 10" fill="none">
                            <path d="M2 5L4 7L8 3" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                        </svg>
                    </div>
                    <span class="dropdown-item-text">${escapeHtml(tag.name)}</span>
                </div>
            `;
        }).join('');

        dropdownList.innerHTML = items;

        // Determine if we can create a new tag
        const hasNoMatches = visibleCount === 0 && normalizedFilter;

        // Show/hide no matches message (only when filtering and no results)
        noMatches.classList.toggle('visible', hasNoMatches);

        // Attach click handlers to dropdown items
        dropdownList.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-item').forEach(item => {
            item.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                const tagId = item.dataset.tagId;
                toggleTag(tagId);
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Toggle a tag's selection state
     * @param {string} tagId - Tag ID to toggle
     */
    function toggleTag(tagId) {
        const state = window.editorState;
        const isSelected = isTagSelected(tagId);

        if (isSelected) {
            state.currentTags = state.currentTags.filter(t => (typeof t === 'object' ? t.id : t) !== tagId);
        } else {
            const tag = (state.availableTags || []).find(t => t.id === tagId);
            if (tag) {
                state.currentTags.push(tag);
            }
        }

        _renderTags();

        // Update just the checkbox state instead of re-rendering the entire list
        const dropdownItem = dropdownList.querySelector(`.dropdown-item[data-tag-id="${tagId}"]`);
        if (dropdownItem) {
            const checkbox = dropdownItem.querySelector('.checkbox');
            if (checkbox) {
                checkbox.classList.toggle('checked', !isSelected);
            }
        }

        // Notify about tag changes
        notifyTagsUpdate();
    }

    /**
     * Adds a new tag
     * @param {string} tagString - Tag name to add
     */
    function _addTag(tagString) {
        const name = tagString.trim();
        if (!name) return;

        const state = window.editorState;

        // Initialize availableTags if it doesn't exist
        if (!state.availableTags) {
            state.availableTags = [];
        }

        // Check if tag already exists
        if (doesTagExist(name)) {
            // If it exists, just select it if not already selected
            const existingTag = state.availableTags.find(t => t.name.toLowerCase() === name.toLowerCase());
            if (existingTag && !isTagSelected(existingTag.id)) {
                state.currentTags.push(existingTag);
                _renderTags();
                renderDropdownList('');
                notifyTagsUpdate();
            }
            return;
        }

        // Create new tag
        const newTag = {
            id: 'tag-' + Date.now(),
            name: name
        };

        state.availableTags.push(newTag);
        state.currentTags.push(newTag);

        if (tagInput) {
            tagInput.value = '';
        }
        _renderTags();
        renderDropdownList('');

        // Keep focus on input so user can continue adding tags
        if (tagInput) {
            tagInput.focus();
        }

        // Notify about tag creation
        if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
            window.myop_cta_handler('tag-created', { name, tagId: newTag.id });
        }

        notifyTagsUpdate();
    }

    /**
     * Removes a tag from selection
     * @param {string} tagId - Tag ID to remove
     */
    function _removeTag(tagId) {
        const state = window.editorState;
        state.currentTags = state.currentTags.filter(t => (typeof t === 'object' ? t.id : t) !== tagId);
        _renderTags();
        renderDropdownList(tagInput ? tagInput.value : '');

        // Notify about tag removal
        if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
            window.myop_cta_handler('tag-removed', { tagId });
        }

        notifyTagsUpdate();
    }

    /**
     * Notify about tags update
     */
    function notifyTagsUpdate() {
        const state = window.editorState;

        // Auto-save tags using existing handler
        if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function' && state.selectedVariant) {
            // Convert tags to simple string array for backward compatibility
            const tagNames = state.currentTags.map(t => typeof t === 'object' ? t.name : t);

            const payload = typeof safeClone === 'function' ? safeClone({
                tags: tagNames,
                component_name: state.componentName,
                version_id: state.selectedVariant.id,
                version_name: state.selectedVariant.name
            }) : {
                tags: tagNames,
                component_name: state.componentName,
                version_id: state.selectedVariant ? state.selectedVariant.id : null,
                version_name: state.selectedVariant ? state.selectedVariant.name : null
            };

            window.myop_cta_handler('update_tags', payload);
            window.myop_cta_handler('tags-updated', { selectedTags: [...state.currentTags] });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Opens the dropdown
     */
    let availableTagsFetched = false;

    function openDropdown() {
        if (isDropdownOpen || !dropdown || !inputWrapper) return;
        isDropdownOpen = true;
        dropdown.classList.add('open');
        inputWrapper.classList.add('dropdown-open');
        renderDropdownList(tagInput ? tagInput.value : '');

        // Request available tags from host on first open
        if (!availableTagsFetched && typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
            availableTagsFetched = true;
            window.myop_cta_handler('fetch_available_tags', {});
        }
    }

    /**
     * Closes the dropdown
     */
    function closeDropdown() {
        if (!isDropdownOpen || !dropdown || !inputWrapper) return;
        isDropdownOpen = false;
        dropdown.classList.remove('open');
        inputWrapper.classList.remove('dropdown-open');
    }

    /**
     * Handles keydown event on tags input field
     * @param {KeyboardEvent} e - Keyboard event
     */
    function _handleTagsInputKeyDown(e) {
        if (e.key === 'Enter') {
            e.preventDefault();
            const name = e.target.value.trim();
            if (name) {
                _addTag(name);
                e.target.value = '';
            }
        } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
            e.preventDefault();
            closeDropdown();
            e.target.blur();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handles input event on tags input field
     * @param {InputEvent} e - Input event
     */
    function _handleTagsInput(e) {
        renderDropdownList(e.target.value);
    }

    /**
     * Handles blur event on tags input field
     * @param {FocusEvent} e - Focus event
     */
    function _handleTagsInputBlur(e) {
        // Don't add tag on blur to prevent accidental additions
        // User must press Enter to add a new tag
    }

    /**
     * Initialize tags event listeners
     */
    function initTagsEventListeners() {
        initTagsDom();

        if (!tagsContainer || !inputWrapper || !tagInput || !dropdown) {
            console.warn('Tags DOM elements not found');
            return;
        }

        // Clicking on the input wrapper opens dropdown and focuses input
        inputWrapper.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            tagInput.focus();
            openDropdown();
        });

        // Focus on input opens dropdown
        tagInput.addEventListener('focus', () => {
            openDropdown();
        });

        // Typing in input filters the list
        tagInput.addEventListener('input', _handleTagsInput);

        // Keyboard handling
        tagInput.addEventListener('keydown', _handleTagsInputKeyDown);

        // Prevent dropdown from closing when clicking inside it
        dropdown.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
        });

        // Close dropdown ONLY when clicking outside the entire container
        document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (!tagsContainer.contains(e.target)) {
                closeDropdown();
            }
        });

        // Also handle Escape when focus is anywhere in the container
        tagsContainer.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                e.preventDefault();
                closeDropdown();
                tagInput.blur();
            }
        });
    }

    /**
     * Set available tags (for initialization from external data)
     * @param {Array} tags - Array of tag objects with id and name
     */
    function setAvailableTags(tags) {
        const state = window.editorState;
        state.availableTags = tags || [];
        renderDropdownList('');
    }

    /**
     * Set selected tags (for initialization from external data)
     * @param {Array} tags - Array of tag objects or strings
     */
    function setSelectedTags(tags) {
        const state = window.editorState;

        // Initialize availableTags if it doesn't exist
        if (!state.availableTags) {
            state.availableTags = [];
        }

        // Convert string tags to objects if needed
        state.currentTags = (tags || []).map(tag => {
            if (typeof tag === 'string') {
                // Check if this tag exists in availableTags
                const existing = (state.availableTags || []).find(t => t.name === tag || t.id === tag);
                if (existing) {
                    return existing;
                }
                // Create a new tag object for string tags and add to availableTags
                const newTag = { id: tag, name: tag };
                state.availableTags.push(newTag);
                return newTag;
            }
            // If it's an object, also ensure it's in availableTags
            const existingObj = state.availableTags.find(t => t.id === tag.id);
            if (!existingObj) {
                state.availableTags.push(tag);
            }
            return tag;
        });

        _renderTags();
        renderDropdownList('');
    }

    // Export to window for global access
    window._renderTags = _renderTags;
    window._addTag = _addTag;
    window._removeTag = _removeTag;
    window._handleTagsInputKeyDown = _handleTagsInputKeyDown;
    window._handleTagsInputBlur = _handleTagsInputBlur;
    window.initTagsEventListeners = initTagsEventListeners;
    window.setAvailableTags = setAvailableTags;
    window.setSelectedTags = setSelectedTags;
    window.renderDropdownList = renderDropdownList;
    window.openTagsDropdown = openDropdown;
    window.closeTagsDropdown = closeDropdown;
})();


/**
 * Preview & Tab Management Module
 * Handles preview rendering, tab switching, and split view
 */

/**
 * Switches between different tab views (code, preview, split)
 * @param {string} tabName - Name of tab to show ('code', 'preview', or 'split')
 */
function showTab(tabName) {
    const dom = window.editorState.dom;
    const tabPreview2 = document.getElementById('tab-preview-2');
    const tabCode2 = document.getElementById('tab-code-2');
    const tabSplit2 = document.getElementById('tab-split-2');
    const mainPanel = document.querySelector('.main-panel');
    const codeContent = document.getElementById('code-content');
    const previewContent = document.getElementById('preview-content');

    // Remove existing divider if it exists
    const existingDivider = mainPanel.querySelector('.split-view-divider');
    if (existingDivider) existingDivider.remove();

    // Reset widths for non-split modes
    codeContent.style.width = '';
    previewContent.style.width = '';

    window.editorState.activeTab = tabName;

    if (tabName === 'split') {
        // SPLIT VIEW MODE
        mainPanel.classList.add('split-view');
        dom.codeContent.classList.add('active');
        dom.previewContent.classList.add('active');
        dom.tabCode.classList.add('active');
        dom.tabPreview.classList.add('active');
        if (dom.tabSplit) dom.tabSplit.classList.add('active');
        if (tabSplit2) tabSplit2.classList.add('active');
        if (tabCode2) tabCode2.classList.remove('active');
        if (tabPreview2) tabPreview2.classList.remove('active');

        // Hide preview action buttons in split mode
        dom.copyCodeBtn2.style.display = 'none';
        dom.pasteReplaceBtn2.style.display = 'none';
        dom.previewToggleBtn.style.display = 'none';

        setupSplitView();
        renderPreview();

        // Re-layout Monaco editor after container becomes visible
        if (window.monacoEditorInstance) {
            requestAnimationFrame(() => window.monacoEditorInstance.layout());
        }

    } else if (tabName === 'code') {
        // CODE ONLY MODE
        mainPanel.classList.remove('split-view');
        dom.codeContent.classList.add('active');
        dom.previewContent.classList.remove('active');
        dom.tabCode.classList.add('active');
        dom.tabPreview.classList.remove('active');
        if (dom.tabSplit) dom.tabSplit.classList.remove('active');
        if (tabSplit2) tabSplit2.classList.remove('active');
        if (tabCode2) tabCode2.classList.add('active');
        if (tabPreview2) tabPreview2.classList.remove('active');

        // Hide preview action buttons
        dom.copyCodeBtn2.style.display = 'none';
        dom.pasteReplaceBtn2.style.display = 'none';
        dom.previewToggleBtn.style.display = 'none';

        // Re-layout Monaco editor after container becomes visible
        if (window.monacoEditorInstance) {
            requestAnimationFrame(() => window.monacoEditorInstance.layout());
        }

    } else {
        // PREVIEW ONLY MODE
        mainPanel.classList.remove('split-view');
        dom.codeContent.classList.remove('active');
        dom.previewContent.classList.add('active');
        dom.tabCode.classList.remove('active');
        dom.tabPreview.classList.add('active');
        if (dom.tabSplit) dom.tabSplit.classList.remove('active');
        if (tabSplit2) tabSplit2.classList.remove('active');
        if (tabCode2) tabCode2.classList.remove('active');
        if (tabPreview2) tabPreview2.classList.add('active');

        // Show preview action buttons
        dom.copyCodeBtn2.style.display = 'flex';
        dom.pasteReplaceBtn2.style.display = 'flex';
        dom.previewToggleBtn.style.display = 'flex';

        renderPreview();
    }
}

let splitViewWidth = 50;

/**
 * Sets up the split view with resizable divider
 */
function setupSplitView() {
    const mainPanel = document.querySelector('.main-panel');
    const codeContent = document.getElementById('code-content');
    const previewContent = document.getElementById('preview-content');
    const previewFrame = document.getElementById('preview-frame');

    const divider = document.createElement('div');
    divider.className = 'split-view-divider';
    mainPanel.insertBefore(divider, previewContent);

    let isResizing = false;

    divider.addEventListener('mousedown', () => {
        isResizing = true;
        mainPanel.classList.add('resizing');
        document.body.style.cursor = 'col-resize';
        if (previewFrame) previewFrame.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
    });

    document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
        if (!isResizing) return;

        const mainRect = mainPanel.getBoundingClientRect();
        const newWidth = ((e.clientX - mainRect.left) / mainRect.width) * 100;

        if (newWidth > 20 && newWidth < 80) {
            splitViewWidth = newWidth;
            codeContent.style.width = splitViewWidth + '%';
            previewContent.style.width = (100 - splitViewWidth) + '%';
        }
    });

    document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
        isResizing = false;
        mainPanel.classList.remove('resizing');
        document.body.style.cursor = 'default';
        if (previewFrame) previewFrame.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';
    });

    // Initial split
    codeContent.style.width = splitViewWidth + '%';
    previewContent.style.width = (100 - splitViewWidth) + '%';
}

/**
 * Checks if the editor code is empty/default and toggles the empty state placeholder
 * Returns true if empty state is shown (no real preview needed)
 */
function _updatePreviewEmptyState(codeValue) {
    const emptyState = document.getElementById('preview-empty-state');
    const previewFrame = window.editorState.dom.previewFrame;
    if (!emptyState) return false;

    // Don't show empty state until host data has been received AND
    // code has been loaded into the editor — prevents flash while
    // Monaco is still initialising or code is arriving from host
    if (!window.editorState._hostDataReceived || !window.editorState._codeReady) return false;

    const trimmed = codeValue.trim();
    const DEFAULT_BOILERPLATE = '<!-- Start coding here -->\n<div>This is my component</div>\n\n<' + 'script>\n\n// Called on initialization and whenever the host sends configuration or state updates to this component\nmyop_init_interface = () => {}\n\n// Provided by the host - call this function to send data or trigger actions in the host app\nmyop_cta_handler = () => {}\n\n</' + 'script>';
    const isEmpty = !trimmed || trimmed === DEFAULT_BOILERPLATE;

    if (isEmpty) {
        emptyState.classList.add('active');
        if (previewFrame) previewFrame.style.visibility = 'hidden';
        return true;
    } else {
        emptyState.classList.remove('active');
        if (previewFrame) previewFrame.style.visibility = 'visible';
        return false;
    }
}

/**
 * Renders the component preview in the iframe
 */
function renderPreview() {
    console.log('[renderPreview] Called, pendingDtoRun:', window.editorState.pendingDtoRun);

    const codeValue = window.editorState.dom.codeEditor?.value || '';

    // Show empty state placeholder if no code
    if (_updatePreviewEmptyState(codeValue)) return;

    // Get pending DTO, or restore from activeDtoRun if a DTO is selected
    let pendingDto = window.editorState.pendingDtoRun;

    if (!pendingDto && window.editorState.activeDtoRun) {
        const { methodName, dtoName, dtoData } = window.editorState.activeDtoRun;

        if (dtoName === '__default__') {
            // Default mode: let the myop_preview script run naturally
            pendingDto = null;
        } else if (dtoData) {
            pendingDto = { methodName, dtoData };
        }
        console.log('[renderPreview] Restored pendingDto from activeDtoRun:', pendingDto);
    }

    // Clear pendingDtoRun after consuming it (activeDtoRun persists)
    if (window.editorState.pendingDtoRun) {
        window.editorState.pendingDtoRun = null;
    }

    if (pendingDto) {
        // Custom DTO mode: use DOMParser to disable myop_preview and inject DTO script
        console.log('[renderPreview] Custom DTO mode:', pendingDto);
        const parser = new DOMParser();
        const doc = parser.parseFromString(codeValue, 'text/html');
        const previewScript = doc.getElementById('myop_preview');

        // Disable the mock data script
        if (previewScript) {
            previewScript.setAttribute('type', 'myop/mock');
        }

        // Inject DTO script that calls the method with test data
        const dtoScript = doc.createElement('script');
        dtoScript.id = 'myop_dto';
        dtoScript.textContent = `
            (function() {
                var dtoData = ${JSON.stringify(pendingDto.dtoData)};
                var methodName = ${JSON.stringify(pendingDto.methodName)};
                function tryInit() {
                    if (typeof window[methodName] === 'function') {
                        console.log('[myop_dto] Calling', methodName, 'with:', dtoData);
                        window[methodName](dtoData);
                    } else {
                        setTimeout(tryInit, 10);
                    }
                }
                setTimeout(tryInit, 0);
            })();
        `;
        doc.body.appendChild(dtoScript);

        window.editorState.dom.previewFrame.srcdoc = doc.documentElement.outerHTML;
    } else {
        // Default mode: set editor HTML directly — no DOM manipulation needed.
        // This preserves all scripts exactly as written.
        window.editorState.dom.previewFrame.srcdoc = codeValue;
    }
}

            var toggleBtn = document.getElementById('left-panel-toggle');
            if (toggleBtn) toggleBtn.click();
