            var pb = parseFloat(cs.paddingBottom)||0, pl = parseFloat(cs.paddingLeft)||0;
            var mt = parseFloat(cs.marginTop)||0, mr = parseFloat(cs.marginRight)||0;
            var mb = parseFloat(cs.marginBottom)||0, ml = parseFloat(cs.marginLeft)||0;
            var bt = parseFloat(cs.borderTopWidth)||0, br2 = parseFloat(cs.borderRightWidth)||0;
            var bb = parseFloat(cs.borderBottomWidth)||0, bl = parseFloat(cs.borderLeftWidth)||0;

            if (area === 'margin') {
                if (mt > 0) drawRect(container, rect.left - ml, rect.top - mt, rect.width + ml + mr, mt, 'rgba(251,146,60,0.35)');
                if (mb > 0) drawRect(container, rect.left - ml, rect.bottom, rect.width + ml + mr, mb, 'rgba(251,146,60,0.35)');
                if (ml > 0) drawRect(container, rect.left - ml, rect.top, ml, rect.height, 'rgba(251,146,60,0.35)');
                if (mr > 0) drawRect(container, rect.right, rect.top, mr, rect.height, 'rgba(251,146,60,0.35)');
            } else if (area === 'border') {
                if (bt > 0) drawRect(container, rect.left, rect.top, rect.width, bt, 'rgba(250,204,21,0.4)');
                if (bb > 0) drawRect(container, rect.left, rect.bottom - bb, rect.width, bb, 'rgba(250,204,21,0.4)');
                if (bl > 0) drawRect(container, rect.left, rect.top + bt, bl, rect.height - bt - bb, 'rgba(250,204,21,0.4)');
                if (br2 > 0) drawRect(container, rect.right - br2, rect.top + bt, br2, rect.height - bt - bb, 'rgba(250,204,21,0.4)');
            } else if (area === 'padding') {
                if (pt > 0) drawRect(container, rect.left + bl, rect.top + bt, rect.width - bl - br2, pt, 'rgba(74,222,128,0.35)');
                if (pb > 0) drawRect(container, rect.left + bl, rect.bottom - bb - pb, rect.width - bl - br2, pb, 'rgba(74,222,128,0.35)');
                if (pl > 0) drawRect(container, rect.left + bl, rect.top + bt + pt, pl, rect.height - bt - bb - pt - pb, 'rgba(74,222,128,0.35)');
                if (pr2 > 0) drawRect(container, rect.right - br2 - pr2, rect.top + bt + pt, pr2, rect.height - bt - bb - pt - pb, 'rgba(74,222,128,0.35)');
            } else if (area === 'content') {
                var cx = rect.left + bl + pl;
                var cy = rect.top + bt + pt;
                var cw = rect.width - bl - br2 - pl - pr2;
                var ch = rect.height - bt - bb - pt - pb;
                drawRect(container, cx, cy, cw, ch, 'rgba(96,165,250,0.3)');
            }
        }
    });

    // ─── Click/hover interception (only when __inspectorActive) ───
    document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        if (!window.__inspectorActive) return;
        if (e.target.closest && e.target.closest('#inspector-overlay-container')) return;
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        var data = collectData(e.target);
        window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'inspectorElementClicked', data: data }, '*');

    document.addEventListener('mouseover', function(e) {

            var pad = 15;
            var left = lastMouseX + pad;
            var top = lastMouseY + pad;
            var tr = inspectTooltip.getBoundingClientRect();
            if (left + tr.width > window.innerWidth - pad) left = lastMouseX - tr.width - pad;
            if (top + tr.height > window.innerHeight - pad) top = lastMouseY - tr.height - pad;

            inspectTooltip.style.top = Math.max(pad, top) + 'px';

        if (!window.__inspectorActive) return;
        if (e.target.closest && e.target.closest('#inspector-overlay-container')) return;

`;

    // ─── Build Panel DOM ───
    function buildPanel() {
        if (panel) return;
        const previewContent = document.getElementById('preview-content');
        if (!previewContent) return;

        panel = document.createElement('div');
        panel.className = 'inspector-panel';
        panel.innerHTML = `
            <div class="inspector-header">
                <div class="inspector-header-left">
                    <span class="inspector-tag-pill" data-ref="tagPill">div</span>
                    <span class="inspector-dimensions" data-ref="dims">0 x 0</span>
                </div>
                <div class="inspector-header-actions">
                    <button class="inspector-go-to-code-btn" data-action="go-to-code" title="Go to code">
                        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none"><path d="M4.5 2L1 7l3.5 5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M9.5 2L13 7l-3.5 5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
                        <span>Code</span>
                    </button>
                    <button class="inspector-close-btn" data-action="close" title="Close inspector (ESC)">
                        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none"><path d="M3 3l8 8M11 3l-8 8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="inspector-breadcrumb" data-ref="breadcrumb"></div>
            <div class="inspector-body" data-ref="body"></div>
        `;

        previewContent.appendChild(panel);

        panel.querySelector('[data-action="close"]').addEventListener('click', close);
        panel.querySelector('[data-action="go-to-code"]').addEventListener('click', goToCode);
        panel.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => e.stopPropagation());
        panel.addEventListener('click', (e) => e.stopPropagation());
    }

    // ─── Inject Inspect Button into xray toolbar ───
    function tryInjectToolbarButton() {
        if (inspectBtn) return;
        const toolbar = document.querySelector('.xray-toolbar');
        if (!toolbar) return;
        const existing = toolbar.querySelector('[data-action="inspect"]');
        if (existing) {
            inspectBtn = existing;
            inspectBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                toggleInspectMode();
            });
            return;
        }
    }

    function toggleInspectMode() {
        inspectModeActive = !inspectModeActive;
        if (inspectBtn) inspectBtn.classList.toggle('active', inspectModeActive);

        if (inspectModeActive) {
            ensureIframeScript();
            setIframeInspectActive(true);
        } else {
            setIframeInspectActive(false);
            close();
        }
    }

    // ─── Iframe Script Injection ───
    function getIframeDoc() {
        const frame = document.getElementById('preview-frame');
        if (!frame) return null;
        try { return frame.contentDocument; } catch (e) { return null; }
    }

    function ensureIframeScript() {
        const doc = getIframeDoc();
        if (!doc || !doc.body) return;
        if (doc.getElementById('inspector-iframe-script')) return;

        const script = doc.createElement('script');
        script.id = 'inspector-iframe-script';
        script.textContent = IFRAME_SCRIPT;
        doc.body.appendChild(script);
    }

    // Expose for visual-edit.js to ensure shared utils are available in iframe
    window._ensureInspectorIframeScript = ensureIframeScript;

    function setIframeInspectActive(active) {
        try {
            const frame = document.getElementById('preview-frame');
            if (frame && frame.contentWindow) {
                frame.contentWindow.__inspectorActive = active;
            }
        } catch (e) {}
    }

    // ─── Message Handling ───
    function handleMessage(e) {
        if (!e.data) return;

        if (e.data.type === 'inspectorElementClicked') {
            // Came from inspector's own click handler inside iframe — new selection
            if (e.data.data) {
                originalBreadcrumb = null; // reset so renderPanel captures the full chain
                selectedXPath = e.data.data.xpath;
                open();
                renderPanel(e.data.data);
                highlightInIframe(e.data.data.xpath);
            }
        }

        if (e.data.type === 'visualEditElementClicked') {
            // Came from visual-edit click — only open inspector on second click of same element
            const xpath = e.data.payload && e.data.payload.xpath;
            if (xpath) {
                ensureIframeScript();
                if (lastVisualEditXPath === xpath) {
                    // Second click on same element — open inspector
                    lastVisualEditXPath = null;
                    originalBreadcrumb = null;
                    selectedXPath = xpath;
                    open();
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        requestDataForXPath(xpath);
                        highlightInIframe(xpath);
                    }, 30);
                } else {
                    // First click — just highlight, don't open panel
                    lastVisualEditXPath = xpath;
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        highlightInIframe(xpath);
                    }, 30);
                }
            }
        }

        if (e.data.type === 'inspectorElementData') {
            // Response from iframe with full computed style data
            if (e.data.data) {
                renderPanel(e.data.data);
            }
        }
    }

    function requestDataForXPath(xpath) {
        const frame = document.getElementById('preview-frame');
        if (frame && frame.contentWindow) {
            frame.contentWindow.postMessage({ type: 'inspectorRequestData', xpath: xpath }, '*');
        }
    }

    function highlightInIframe(xpath) {
        const frame = document.getElementById('preview-frame');
        if (frame && frame.contentWindow) {
            frame.contentWindow.postMessage({ type: 'inspectorHighlight', xpath: xpath }, '*');
        }
    }

    function clearIframeOverlays() {
        const frame = document.getElementById('preview-frame');
        if (frame && frame.contentWindow) {
            frame.contentWindow.postMessage({ type: 'inspectorClearOverlays' }, '*');
        }
    }

    function highlightBoxArea(area) {
        if (!selectedXPath) return;
        const frame = document.getElementById('preview-frame');
        if (frame && frame.contentWindow) {
            frame.contentWindow.postMessage({ type: 'inspectorHighlightBoxArea', xpath: selectedXPath, area: area }, '*');
        }
    }

    function restoreHighlight() {
        if (selectedXPath) highlightInIframe(selectedXPath);
    }

    // ─── Open / Close ───
    function open() {
        buildPanel();
        if (!panel) return;
        isOpen = true;
        panel.classList.add('open');
    }

    function close() {
        isOpen = false;
        selectedXPath = null;
        originalBreadcrumb = null;
        lastVisualEditXPath = null;
        if (panel) panel.classList.remove('open');
        clearIframeOverlays();
        if (inspectModeActive) {
            inspectModeActive = false;
            if (inspectBtn) inspectBtn.classList.remove('active');
            setIframeInspectActive(false);
        }
    }

    // ─── Render Panel ───
    function renderPanel(data) {
        if (!panel) buildPanel();
        if (!panel || !data) return;
        selectedData = data;

        // Header
        const tagPill = panel.querySelector('[data-ref="tagPill"]');
        const dims = panel.querySelector('[data-ref="dims"]');
        const tagText = data.tagName + (data.id ? '#' + data.id : '') +
            (data.className ? '.' + data.className.split(/\s+/).filter(c => c && !c.startsWith('visual-edit') && !c.startsWith('inspector-')).slice(0, 1).join('.') : '');
        if (tagPill) tagPill.textContent = tagText;
        if (dims) dims.textContent = data.rect.width + ' \u00d7 ' + data.rect.height;

        // Breadcrumb — preserve full chain from deepest selection
        if (!originalBreadcrumb) originalBreadcrumb = data.breadcrumb;
        renderBreadcrumb(originalBreadcrumb);

        // Body sections
        const body = panel.querySelector('[data-ref="body"]');
        if (!body) return;
        body.innerHTML = '';

        const c = data.computed;

        // Box Model
        body.appendChild(buildSection('Box Model', 'box-model', () => buildBoxModel(c, data.rect)));

        // Layout
        body.appendChild(buildSection('Layout', 'layout', () => {
            const rows = [];
            rows.push(row('display', c['display']));
            rows.push(row('position', c['position']));
            if (c['position'] !== 'static') {
                if (c['top'] !== 'auto') rows.push(row('top', c['top']));
                if (c['right'] !== 'auto') rows.push(row('right', c['right']));
                if (c['bottom'] !== 'auto') rows.push(row('bottom', c['bottom']));
                if (c['left'] !== 'auto') rows.push(row('left', c['left']));
            }
            if (c['z-index'] !== 'auto') rows.push(row('z-index', c['z-index']));
            if (c['display'] && c['display'].includes('flex')) {
                rows.push(row('flex-direction', c['flex-direction']));
                rows.push(row('flex-wrap', c['flex-wrap']));
                rows.push(row('justify-content', c['justify-content']));
                rows.push(row('align-items', c['align-items']));
                if (c['align-self'] !== 'auto') rows.push(row('align-self', c['align-self']));
                if (c['gap'] && c['gap'] !== 'normal') rows.push(row('gap', c['gap']));
            }
            if (c['display'] && c['display'].includes('grid')) {
                rows.push(row('grid-template-columns', c['grid-template-columns']));
                rows.push(row('grid-template-rows', c['grid-template-rows']));
                if (c['grid-column'] !== 'auto / auto') rows.push(row('grid-column', c['grid-column']));
                if (c['grid-row'] !== 'auto / auto') rows.push(row('grid-row', c['grid-row']));
                if (c['gap'] && c['gap'] !== 'normal') rows.push(row('gap', c['gap']));
            }
            if (c['float'] !== 'none') rows.push(row('float', c['float']));
            return rows;
        }));

        // Size
        body.appendChild(buildSection('Size', 'size', () => {
            const rows = [];
            rows.push(row('width', c['width']));
            rows.push(row('height', c['height']));
            if (c['min-width'] !== '0px') rows.push(row('min-width', c['min-width']));
            if (c['max-width'] !== 'none') rows.push(row('max-width', c['max-width']));
            if (c['min-height'] !== '0px') rows.push(row('min-height', c['min-height']));
            if (c['max-height'] !== 'none') rows.push(row('max-height', c['max-height']));
            if (c['overflow'] !== 'visible') rows.push(row('overflow', c['overflow']));
            rows.push(row('box-sizing', c['box-sizing']));
            return rows;
        }));

        // Spacing
        body.appendChild(buildSection('Spacing', 'spacing', () => {
            const frag = document.createDocumentFragment();
            frag.appendChild(spacingGrid('Margin', [c['margin-top'], c['margin-right'], c['margin-bottom'], c['margin-left']]));
            frag.appendChild(spacingGrid('Padding', [c['padding-top'], c['padding-right'], c['padding-bottom'], c['padding-left']]));
            if (c['gap'] && c['gap'] !== 'normal' && c['gap'] !== '0px') {
                frag.appendChild(row('gap', c['gap']));
            }
            return frag;
        }));

        // Typography
        body.appendChild(buildSection('Typography', 'typography', () => {
            const rows = [];
            rows.push(row('font-family', c['font-family']));
            rows.push(row('font-size', c['font-size']));
            rows.push(row('font-weight', c['font-weight']));
            if (c['font-style'] !== 'normal') rows.push(row('font-style', c['font-style']));
            rows.push(row('line-height', c['line-height']));
            if (c['letter-spacing'] !== 'normal') rows.push(row('letter-spacing', c['letter-spacing']));
            rows.push(row('text-align', c['text-align']));
            if (c['text-decoration'] !== 'none' && !c['text-decoration'].startsWith('none')) rows.push(row('text-decoration', c['text-decoration']));
            if (c['text-transform'] !== 'none') rows.push(row('text-transform', c['text-transform']));
            return rows;
        }));

        // Colors
        body.appendChild(buildSection('Colors', 'colors', () => {
            const frag = document.createDocumentFragment();
            frag.appendChild(colorRow('color', c['color']));
            frag.appendChild(colorRow('background', c['background-color']));
            if (c['border-top-color'] && c['border-top-width'] !== '0px') {
                frag.appendChild(colorRow('border', c['border-top-color']));
            }
            return frag;
        }));

        // Border
        body.appendChild(buildSection('Border', 'border', () => {
            const rows = [];
            const bw = [c['border-top-width'], c['border-right-width'], c['border-bottom-width'], c['border-left-width']];
            const allZero = bw.every(v => v === '0px');
            if (!allZero) {
                rows.push(row('width', bw.join(' ')));
                rows.push(row('style', [c['border-top-style'], c['border-right-style'], c['border-bottom-style'], c['border-left-style']].join(' ')));
            }
            const br = [c['border-top-left-radius'], c['border-top-right-radius'], c['border-bottom-right-radius'], c['border-bottom-left-radius']];
            const allZeroBr = br.every(v => v === '0px');
            if (!allZeroBr) {
                rows.push(row('radius', br.join(' ')));
            }
            if (allZero && allZeroBr) {
                rows.push(row('border', 'none'));
            }
            return rows;
        }));

        // Effects
        body.appendChild(buildSection('Effects', 'effects', () => {
            const rows = [];
            if (c['opacity'] !== '1') rows.push(row('opacity', c['opacity']));
            if (c['box-shadow'] !== 'none') rows.push(row('box-shadow', c['box-shadow']));
            if (c['text-shadow'] !== 'none') rows.push(row('text-shadow', c['text-shadow']));
            if (c['transform'] !== 'none') rows.push(row('transform', c['transform']));
            if (c['filter'] !== 'none') rows.push(row('filter', c['filter']));
            if (c['transition'] !== 'all 0s ease 0s' && c['transition'] !== 'none') rows.push(row('transition', c['transition']));
            if (rows.length === 0) rows.push(row('', 'none'));
            return rows;
        }));

        // CSS Snippet
        body.appendChild(buildSection('CSS', 'css-snippet', () => buildCssSnippet(c)));
    }

    // ─── Section Builder ───
    function buildSection(title, key, contentFn) {
        const section = document.createElement('div');
        section.className = 'inspector-section' + (collapsedSections[key] ? ' collapsed' : '');

        const header = document.createElement('div');
        header.className = 'inspector-section-header';
        header.innerHTML = '<span class="inspector-section-title">' + title + '</span>' + CHEVRON_SVG;
        header.addEventListener('click', () => {
            section.classList.toggle('collapsed');
            collapsedSections[key] = section.classList.contains('collapsed');
        });
        section.appendChild(header);

        const content = document.createElement('div');
        content.className = 'inspector-section-content';

        const result = contentFn();
        if (result instanceof DocumentFragment || result instanceof HTMLElement) {
            content.appendChild(result);
        } else if (Array.isArray(result)) {
            result.forEach(el => { if (el) content.appendChild(el); });
        }

        section.appendChild(content);
        return section;
    }

    // ─── Row Helper ───
    function row(label, value) {
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.className = 'inspector-row';
        const l = document.createElement('span');
        l.className = 'inspector-label';
        l.textContent = label;
        const v = document.createElement('span');
        v.className = 'inspector-value';
        v.textContent = value || '';
        v.addEventListener('click', () => copyValue(v, label + ': ' + (value || '')));
        div.appendChild(l);
        div.appendChild(v);
        return div;
    }

    // ─── Color Row ───
    function colorRow(label, value) {
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.className = 'inspector-color-row';

        const l = document.createElement('span');
        l.className = 'inspector-label';
        l.textContent = label;

        const swatch = document.createElement('div');
        swatch.className = 'inspector-color-swatch';
        swatch.style.background = value;

        const v = document.createElement('span');
        v.className = 'inspector-color-value';

        let format = 0;
        const formats = [value];
        const parsed = parseColor(value);
        if (parsed) {
            formats.push(rgbToHex(parsed.r, parsed.g, parsed.b, parsed.a));
            formats.push(rgbToHsl(parsed.r, parsed.g, parsed.b, parsed.a));
        }
        v.textContent = formats[0];

        swatch.addEventListener('click', () => {
            format = (format + 1) % formats.length;
            v.textContent = formats[format];
        });
        v.addEventListener('click', () => copyValue(v, label + ': ' + v.textContent));

        div.appendChild(l);
        div.appendChild(swatch);
        div.appendChild(v);
        return div;
    }

    // ─── Spacing Grid ───
    function spacingGrid(label, values) {
        const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
        wrapper.style.marginBottom = '6px';

        const lbl = document.createElement('div');
        lbl.className = 'inspector-spacing-label';
        lbl.textContent = label;
        lbl.style.marginBottom = '3px';
        wrapper.appendChild(lbl);

        const grid = document.createElement('div');
        grid.className = 'inspector-spacing-grid';
        const labels = ['T', 'R', 'B', 'L'];
        const sides = ['top', 'right', 'bottom', 'left'];
        values.forEach((val, i) => {
            const cell = document.createElement('div');
            cell.className = 'inspector-spacing-cell';
            cell.innerHTML = '<span style="opacity:0.4;font-size:8px;display:block;">' + labels[i] + '</span>' + (val || '0');
            cell.addEventListener('click', () => copyValue(cell, label.toLowerCase() + '-' + sides[i] + ': ' + (val || '0')));
            grid.appendChild(cell);
        });
        wrapper.appendChild(grid);
        return wrapper;
    }

    // ─── Box Model ───
    function buildBoxModel(c, rect) {
        const container = document.createElement('div');
        container.className = 'inspector-box-model';

        const marginVals = [c['margin-top'], c['margin-right'], c['margin-bottom'], c['margin-left']];
        const borderVals = [c['border-top-width'], c['border-right-width'], c['border-bottom-width'], c['border-left-width']];
        const paddingVals = [c['padding-top'], c['padding-right'], c['padding-bottom'], c['padding-left']];
        const contentSize = rect.width + ' \u00d7 ' + rect.height;

        container.appendChild(boxLayer('margin', 'margin-layer', marginVals,
            boxLayer('border', 'border-layer', borderVals,
                boxLayer('padding', 'padding-layer', paddingVals,
                    contentBox(contentSize)
                )
            )
        ));
        return container;
    }

    function boxLayer(name, cls, values, innerEl) {
        const layer = document.createElement('div');
        layer.className = 'inspector-box-layer ' + cls;

        // Highlight corresponding area in preview on hover
        layer.addEventListener('mouseenter', (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            highlightBoxArea(name);
        });
        layer.addEventListener('mouseleave', (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            restoreHighlight();
        });

        const label = document.createElement('span');
        label.className = 'inspector-box-layer-label';
        label.textContent = name;
        layer.appendChild(label);

        const topRow = document.createElement('div');
        topRow.style.textAlign = 'center';
        topRow.appendChild(boxVal(values[0]));
        layer.appendChild(topRow);

        const mid = document.createElement('div');
        mid.className = 'inspector-box-values';
        mid.appendChild(boxVal(values[3]));
        if (innerEl) mid.appendChild(innerEl);
        mid.appendChild(boxVal(values[1]));
        layer.appendChild(mid);

        const bottomRow = document.createElement('div');
        bottomRow.style.textAlign = 'center';
        bottomRow.appendChild(boxVal(values[2]));
        layer.appendChild(bottomRow);

        return layer;
    }

    function contentBox(sizeText) {
        const layer = document.createElement('div');
        layer.className = 'inspector-box-layer content-layer';

        layer.addEventListener('mouseenter', (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            highlightBoxArea('content');
        });
        layer.addEventListener('mouseleave', (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            restoreHighlight();
        });

        const label = document.createElement('span');
        label.className = 'inspector-box-layer-label';
        label.textContent = 'content';
        layer.appendChild(label);
        const size = document.createElement('div');
        size.className = 'inspector-box-content-size';
        size.textContent = sizeText;
        size.style.cursor = 'pointer';
        size.addEventListener('click', () => copyValue(size, sizeText));
        layer.appendChild(size);
        return layer;
    }

    function boxVal(value) {
        const span = document.createElement('span');
        span.className = 'inspector-box-val';
        span.textContent = shortenPx(value);
        span.addEventListener('click', () => copyValue(span, value));
        return span;
    }

    function shortenPx(val) {
        if (!val) return '0';
        const n = parseFloat(val);
        if (isNaN(n)) return val;
        return n === 0 ? '0' : n.toString();
    }

    // ─── CSS Snippet ───
    function buildCssSnippet(computed) {
        const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
        wrapper.className = 'inspector-snippet';

        const code = document.createElement('div');
        code.className = 'inspector-snippet-code';

        const interesting = [];
        const defaults = getDefaultValues();

        const importantProps = [
            'display', 'position', 'top', 'right', 'bottom', 'left', 'z-index',
            'flex-direction', 'flex-wrap', 'justify-content', 'align-items', 'gap',
            'grid-template-columns', 'grid-template-rows',
            'width', 'height', 'min-width', 'max-width', 'min-height', 'max-height',
            'margin-top', 'margin-right', 'margin-bottom', 'margin-left',
            'padding-top', 'padding-right', 'padding-bottom', 'padding-left',
            'border-top-width', 'border-right-width', 'border-bottom-width', 'border-left-width',
            'border-top-style', 'border-right-style', 'border-bottom-style', 'border-left-style',
            'border-top-color', 'border-right-color', 'border-bottom-color', 'border-left-color',
            'border-top-left-radius', 'border-top-right-radius', 'border-bottom-right-radius', 'border-bottom-left-radius',
            'font-family', 'font-size', 'font-weight', 'font-style', 'line-height',
            'letter-spacing', 'text-align', 'text-decoration', 'text-transform',
            'color', 'background-color', 'background-image', 'background-size',
            'opacity', 'box-shadow', 'text-shadow', 'transform', 'filter', 'transition',
            'overflow', 'box-sizing', 'visibility', 'white-space', 'vertical-align',
            'list-style-type', 'float', 'clear'
        ];

        for (const prop of importantProps) {
            const val = computed[prop];
            if (!val) continue;
            if (SKIP_CSS_PROPS.has(prop)) continue;
            const def = defaults[prop];
            if (val === def) continue;
            if (val === 'auto' && ['top', 'right', 'bottom', 'left', 'z-index', 'min-width', 'max-width', 'min-height', 'max-height'].includes(prop)) continue;
            if (val === 'none' && ['text-decoration', 'text-shadow', 'box-shadow', 'transform', 'filter', 'background-image', 'list-style-type', 'float', 'clear'].includes(prop)) continue;
            if (val === '0px' && prop.startsWith('margin')) continue;
            if (val === '0px' && prop.startsWith('padding')) continue;
            if (val === '0px' && prop.startsWith('border') && prop.endsWith('width')) continue;
            if (val === '0px' && prop.endsWith('radius')) continue;
            if (val === 'normal' && ['letter-spacing', 'gap'].includes(prop)) continue;
            if (val === 'visible' && ['overflow', 'visibility'].includes(prop)) continue;
            if (val === 'baseline' && prop === 'vertical-align') continue;
            if (val === 'start' && prop === 'text-align') continue;
            interesting.push({ prop, val });
        }

        if (interesting.length === 0) {
            code.textContent = '/* no notable styles */';
        } else {
            code.innerHTML = interesting.map(({ prop, val }) => highlightCSS(prop, val)).join('\n');
        }

        const copyBtn = document.createElement('button');
        copyBtn.className = 'inspector-snippet-copy';
        copyBtn.title = 'Copy CSS';
        copyBtn.innerHTML = '<svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none"><rect x="3.5" y="3.5" width="7" height="7" rx="1" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2"/><path d="M8.5 3.5V2a1 1 0 00-1-1H2a1 1 0 00-1 1v5.5a1 1 0 001 1h1.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2"/></svg>';
        copyBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const text = interesting.map(({ prop, val }) => prop + ': ' + val + ';').join('\n');
            copyToClipboard(text);
            copyBtn.classList.add('copied');
            setTimeout(() => copyBtn.classList.remove('copied'), 800);
        });

        wrapper.appendChild(code);
        wrapper.appendChild(copyBtn);
        return wrapper;
    }

    function highlightCSS(prop, val) {
        let colorPreview = '';
        if (isColorValue(val)) {
            colorPreview = '<span class="inspector-css-color-preview" style="background:' + escapeHtml(val) + '"></span>';
        }
        const highlighted = escapeHtml(val).replace(/(-?\d+\.?\d*)(px|em|rem|%|vh|vw|s|ms|deg)?/g, '<span class="inspector-css-num">$1$2</span>');
        return '<span class="inspector-css-prop">' + escapeHtml(prop) + '</span>: ' + colorPreview + '<span class="inspector-css-val">' + highlighted + '</span>;';
    }

    function escapeHtml(str) {
        return str.replace(/&/g, '&').replace(/</g, '<').replace(/>/g, '>').replace(/"/g, '"');
    }

    // ─── Breadcrumb ───
    function renderBreadcrumb(chain) {
        const bc = panel.querySelector('[data-ref="breadcrumb"]');
        if (!bc) return;
        bc.innerHTML = '';
        if (!chain) return;

        chain.forEach((item, i) => {
            if (i > 0) {
                const sep = document.createElement('span');
                sep.className = 'inspector-breadcrumb-sep';
                sep.textContent = '\u203a';
                bc.appendChild(sep);
            }
            const el = document.createElement('span');
            const isActive = item.xpath === selectedXPath;
            el.className = 'inspector-breadcrumb-item' + (isActive ? ' active' : '');
            el.textContent = item.label;
            el.addEventListener('click', () => {
                selectedXPath = item.xpath;
                requestDataForXPath(item.xpath);
                highlightInIframe(item.xpath);
            });
            bc.appendChild(el);
        });

        bc.scrollLeft = bc.scrollWidth;
    }

    // ─── Copy to Clipboard ───
    function copyValue(el, text) {
        copyToClipboard(text || el.textContent);
        el.classList.add('copied');
        setTimeout(() => el.classList.remove('copied'), 600);
    }

    function copyToClipboard(text) {
        if (navigator.clipboard) {
            navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).catch(() => fallbackCopy(text));
        } else {
            fallbackCopy(text);
        }
    }

    function fallbackCopy(text) {
        const ta = document.createElement('textarea');
        ta.value = text;
        ta.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;left:-9999px;';
        document.body.appendChild(ta);
        ta.select();
        document.execCommand('copy');
        ta.remove();
    }

    // ─── Color Utilities ───
    function parseColor(str) {
        if (!str) return null;
        let m = str.match(/rgba?\(\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*(\d+)\s*(?:,\s*([\d.]+))?\s*\)/);
        if (m) return { r: +m[1], g: +m[2], b: +m[3], a: m[4] !== undefined ? +m[4] : 1 };
        return null;
    }

    function rgbToHex(r, g, b, a) {
        const hex = '#' + [r, g, b].map(v => v.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('');
        if (a < 1) return hex + Math.round(a * 255).toString(16).padStart(2, '0');
        return hex;
    }

    function rgbToHsl(r, g, b, a) {
        r /= 255; g /= 255; b /= 255;
        const max = Math.max(r, g, b), min = Math.min(r, g, b);
        let h = 0, s = 0, l = (max + min) / 2;
        if (max !== min) {
            const d = max - min;
            s = l > 0.5 ? d / (2 - max - min) : d / (max + min);
            if (max === r) h = ((g - b) / d + (g < b ? 6 : 0)) / 6;
            else if (max === g) h = ((b - r) / d + 2) / 6;
            else h = ((r - g) / d + 4) / 6;
        }
        const hRound = Math.round(h * 360), sRound = Math.round(s * 100), lRound = Math.round(l * 100);
        if (a < 1) return 'hsla(' + hRound + ', ' + sRound + '%, ' + lRound + '%, ' + a.toFixed(2) + ')';
        return 'hsl(' + hRound + ', ' + sRound + '%, ' + lRound + '%)';
    }

    function isColorValue(str) {
        if (!str) return false;
        return /^(rgb|hsl|#)/.test(str.trim());
    }

    // ─── Default CSS Values for diffing ───
    function getDefaultValues() {
        return {
            'display': 'block', 'position': 'static',
            'top': 'auto', 'right': 'auto', 'bottom': 'auto', 'left': 'auto',
            'z-index': 'auto',
            'flex-direction': 'row', 'flex-wrap': 'nowrap',
            'justify-content': 'normal', 'align-items': 'normal',
            'gap': 'normal', 'row-gap': 'normal', 'column-gap': 'normal',
            'grid-template-columns': 'none', 'grid-template-rows': 'none',
            'grid-column': 'auto / auto', 'grid-row': 'auto / auto',
            'width': 'auto', 'height': 'auto',
            'min-width': '0px', 'max-width': 'none',
            'min-height': '0px', 'max-height': 'none',
            'overflow': 'visible', 'overflow-x': 'visible', 'overflow-y': 'visible',
            'box-sizing': 'content-box',
            'margin-top': '0px', 'margin-right': '0px', 'margin-bottom': '0px', 'margin-left': '0px',
            'padding-top': '0px', 'padding-right': '0px', 'padding-bottom': '0px', 'padding-left': '0px',
            'border-top-width': '0px', 'border-right-width': '0px', 'border-bottom-width': '0px', 'border-left-width': '0px',
            'border-top-style': 'none', 'border-right-style': 'none', 'border-bottom-style': 'none', 'border-left-style': 'none',
            'border-top-color': '', 'border-right-color': '', 'border-bottom-color': '', 'border-left-color': '',
            'border-top-left-radius': '0px', 'border-top-right-radius': '0px',
            'border-bottom-right-radius': '0px', 'border-bottom-left-radius': '0px',
            'font-family': '', 'font-size': '16px', 'font-weight': '400', 'font-style': 'normal',
            'line-height': 'normal', 'letter-spacing': 'normal',
            'text-align': 'start', 'text-decoration': 'none', 'text-transform': 'none',
            'color': '', 'background-color': 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)', 'background-image': 'none', 'background-size': 'auto',
            'opacity': '1', 'box-shadow': 'none', 'text-shadow': 'none',
            'transform': 'none', 'filter': 'none', 'transition': 'all 0s ease 0s',
            'visibility': 'visible', 'white-space': 'normal', 'vertical-align': 'baseline',
            'list-style-type': 'none', 'float': 'none', 'clear': 'none',
        };
    }

    // ─── Go to Code ───
    function goToCode() {
        if (!selectedData) return;
        const editor = window.monacoEditorInstance;
        if (!editor) return;

        const code = editor.getValue();
        const match = findElementInCode(code, selectedData);

        // Switch to code tab (or split)
        const tabCode = document.getElementById('tab-code-2') || document.getElementById('tab-code');
        if (tabCode) tabCode.click();

        // Give the tab switch a moment to render, then jump
        setTimeout(() => {
            if (!match) {
                // Fallback: open Monaco find widget with the best search term we have
                const searchTerm = selectedData.id ? 'id="' + selectedData.id + '"'
                    : selectedData.textContent ? selectedData.textContent.substring(0, 40)
                    : '<' + selectedData.tagName;
                editor.focus();
                editor.getAction('actions.find').run();
                const model = editor.getModel();
                const found = model.findMatches(searchTerm, false, false, false, null, true, 1);
                if (found.length > 0) {
                    editor.setSelection(found[0].range);
                    editor.revealRangeInCenter(found[0].range);
                }
                return;
            }

            editor.focus();
            editor.setSelection(match.range);
            editor.revealRangeInCenter(match.range);
            // Flash the highlight
            const decorations = editor.deltaDecorations([], [{
                range: match.range,
                options: {
                    className: 'inspector-code-highlight',
                    isWholeLine: true,
                    overviewRuler: { color: '#9a70df', position: 1 }
                }
            }]);
            setTimeout(() => editor.deltaDecorations(decorations, []), 2000);
        }, 150);
    }

    function findElementInCode(code, data) {
        const editor = window.monacoEditorInstance;
        if (!editor) return null;
        const model = editor.getModel();
        if (!model) return null;

        // Helper: pick best match when multiple found, using textContent proximity
        function disambiguate(matches) {
            if (matches.length === 1) return matches[0];
            if (data.textContent && data.textContent.length >= 3) {
                const snippet = data.textContent.substring(0, 40);
                for (const m of matches) {
                    const startLine = m.range.startLineNumber;
                    for (let l = startLine; l <= Math.min(startLine + 5, model.getLineCount()); l++) {
                        if (model.getLineContent(l).indexOf(snippet) !== -1) return m;
                    }
                }
            }
            return matches[0];
        }

        // Strategy 1: Match the exact opening tag from outerHTML
        if (data.openingTag && data.openingTag.length > 3) {
            const tag = data.openingTag;

            // 1a: Try full opening tag (literal match)
            const found = model.findMatches(escapeRegex(tag), false, false, false, null, true, 10);
            if (found.length > 0) return { range: lineRange(model, disambiguate(found).range) };

            // 1b: Opening tag might span multiple lines in source.
            //     Try just <tagName + first attribute (e.g. <div class="card")
            const firstAttr = tag.match(/^(<\w[\w-]*\s+[^\s=]+=(?:"[^"]*"|'[^']*'))/);
            if (firstAttr) {
                const f2 = model.findMatches(escapeRegex(firstAttr[1]), false, false, false, null, true, 10);
                if (f2.length > 0) return { range: lineRange(model, disambiguate(f2).range) };
            }

            // 1c: Try <tagName + just the attribute names/values separately
            //     Extract all attr="value" pairs and search for the most unique one
            const attrPairs = [];
            const attrRe = /\s([\w-]+)="([^"]*)"/g;
            let am;
            while ((am = attrRe.exec(tag)) !== null) {
                const name = am[1], value = am[2];
                if (name === 'style') continue; // skip style, often dynamic
                attrPairs.push({ name, value, full: am[0].trim() });
            }
            // Sort by specificity: id first, then data-*, then others with long values
            attrPairs.sort((a, b) => {
                if (a.name === 'id') return -1;
                if (b.name === 'id') return 1;
                if (a.name.startsWith('data-') && !b.name.startsWith('data-')) return -1;
                if (b.name.startsWith('data-') && !a.name.startsWith('data-')) return 1;
                return b.value.length - a.value.length;
            });
            for (const attr of attrPairs) {
                const f3 = model.findMatches(escapeRegex(attr.full), false, false, false, null, true, 10);
                if (f3.length === 1) return { range: lineRange(model, f3[0].range) };
                if (f3.length > 1) {
                    // Narrow to results that also match our tag name
                    const narrowed = f3.filter(m => {
                        const line = model.getLineContent(m.range.startLineNumber);
                        return line.indexOf('<' + data.tagName) !== -1;
                    });
                    if (narrowed.length === 1) return { range: lineRange(model, narrowed[0].range) };
                    if (narrowed.length > 1) return { range: lineRange(model, disambiguate(narrowed).range) };
                }
            }
        }

        // Strategy 2: Text content search (best for leaf elements: buttons, headings, links, spans)
        if (data.textContent && data.textContent.length >= 2) {
            const snippet = escapeRegex(data.textContent.substring(0, 60));
            const found = model.findMatches(snippet, false, false, false, null, true, 20);
            if (found.length > 0) {
                // Find the match whose enclosing tag matches our tagName
                for (const m of found) {
                    let line = m.range.startLineNumber;
                    for (let l = line; l >= Math.max(1, line - 10); l--) {
                        const content = model.getLineContent(l);
                        const tagIdx = content.indexOf('<' + data.tagName);
                        if (tagIdx !== -1) {
                            return { range: new monaco.Range(l, tagIdx + 1, l, content.length + 1) };
                        }
                    }
                }
                return { range: lineRange(model, found[0].range) };
            }
        }

        // Strategy 3: id-based (highly unique)
        if (data.id) {
            const found = model.findMatches('id="' + data.id + '"', false, false, true, null, true, 1);
            if (found.length > 0) return { range: lineRange(model, found[0].range) };
        }

        return null;
    }

    function lineRange(model, range) {
        const line = range.startLineNumber;
        const content = model.getLineContent(line);
        return new monaco.Range(line, 1, line, content.length + 1);
    }

    function escapeRegex(str) {
        return str.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
    }

    // ─── Keyboard ───
    function handleKeyDown(e) {
        if (e.key === 'Escape' && isOpen) {
            close();
        }
    }

    // ─── Init ───
    function initInspector() {
        window.addEventListener('message', handleMessage);
        document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown, true);

        // Close panel when clicking outside it (on preview area or main content)
        document.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
            if (!isOpen || !panel) return;
            // If click is inside the panel, ignore
            if (panel.contains(e.target)) return;
            // If click is on the inspect toolbar button, ignore (toggle handles it)
            if (inspectBtn && inspectBtn.contains(e.target)) return;
            close();
        });

        // Close panel and clear overlays when visual edit mode is turned off or agent updates the component
        // Note: no isOpen guard — highlights can exist even when the panel isn't open (first visual-edit click)
        window.addEventListener('message', function(e) {
            if (!e.data) return;
            if (e.data.type === 'visualEditMode' && !e.data.payload?.enabled) {
                close();
            }
            if (e.data.type === 'visualEditCancel' || e.data.type === 'escKeyPressed') {
                close();
            }
            if (e.data.type === 'componentUpdated') {
                close();
            }
        });

        // Watch for xray toolbar to appear (it's lazy-built on Shift hold)
        const previewContent = document.getElementById('preview-content');
        if (previewContent) {
            const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
                if (!inspectBtn) tryInjectToolbarButton();
            });
            observer.observe(previewContent, { childList: true, subtree: true });
        }

        // Hook renderPreview to inject iframe script on every render
        const origRenderPreview = window.renderPreview;
        if (origRenderPreview) {
            window.renderPreview = function () {
                origRenderPreview.apply(this, arguments);
                const previewFrame = document.getElementById('preview-frame');
                if (previewFrame) {
                    previewFrame.addEventListener('load', function onLoad() {
                        previewFrame.removeEventListener('load', onLoad);
                        // Always inject the data-collection script
                        ensureIframeScript();
                        // Restore inspect mode if active
                        if (inspectModeActive) {
                            setIframeInspectActive(true);
                        }
                        // Re-select previous element
                        if (isOpen && selectedXPath) {
                            setTimeout(() => {
                                requestDataForXPath(selectedXPath);
                                highlightInIframe(selectedXPath);
                            }, 50);
                        }
                    });
                }
            };
        }

        // Also inject into the current iframe if it already has content
        const currentFrame = document.getElementById('preview-frame');
        if (currentFrame) {
            try {
                if (currentFrame.contentDocument && currentFrame.contentDocument.body) {
                    ensureIframeScript();
                }
            } catch (e) {}
            // And on future loads
            currentFrame.addEventListener('load', () => {
                ensureIframeScript();
            });
        }
    }

    // ─── Expose ───
    window.inspector = {
        init: initInspector,
        open: open,
        close: close,
        isOpen: () => isOpen,
    };
})();


// Main application
function _bindEvents() {
        const dom = editorState.dom;

        // Helper to show/hide iframe overlay based on dropdown states
        const updateIframeOverlay = () => {
            const anyDropdownOpen =
                dom.componentDropdown.classList.contains('show') ||
                dom.variantDropdown.classList.contains('show') ||
                dom.componentMenu.classList.contains('show') ||
                (dom.runTestsDropdown && dom.runTestsDropdown.classList.contains('show'));

            if (dom.iframeOverlay) {
                if (anyDropdownOpen) {
                    dom.iframeOverlay.classList.add('active');
                } else {
                    dom.iframeOverlay.classList.remove('active');
                }
            }
        };

        const cta_action = (action_id, payload) => {
            if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                const safePayload = safeClone(payload);
                window.myop_cta_handler(action_id, safePayload);
            } else {
                console.warn("Host function 'myop_cta_handler' is not defined.");
            }

            // Make sure preview buttons are visible in preview tab
            dom.copyCodeBtn2.style.display = 'flex';
            dom.pasteReplaceBtn2.style.display = 'flex';
            dom.previewToggleBtn.style.display = 'flex';
        };

        // Handle chevron click to toggle dropdown
        const componentChevron = document.getElementById('component-chevron');
        if (componentChevron) {
            componentChevron.onclick = (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                const isOpening = !dom.componentDropdown.classList.contains('show');
                dom.componentDropdown.classList.toggle('show');
                dom.variantDropdown.classList.remove('show');
                dom.componentMenu.classList.remove('show');
                updateIframeOverlay();

                if (isOpening) {
                    const searchInput = document.getElementById('component-search');
                    if (searchInput) {
                        searchInput.value = '';
                        const items = dom.componentList.querySelectorAll('.modal-dropdown-item');
                        items.forEach(item => item.style.display = 'flex');
                    }
                }
            };
        }

        // Handle component name editing - with immediate recognition
        const updateComponentName = () => {
            const newName = dom.componentNameDisplay.value.trim();
            if (newName && newName !== editorState.componentName) {
                editorState.componentName = newName;
                dom.componentNameDisplay.classList.remove('empty-state');
                _updateButtonStates(); // Immediately update button states

                // Auto-save component name change
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    const payload = safeClone({
                        component_id: editorState.componentId,
                        component_name: newName
                    });
                    window.myop_cta_handler('update_component_name', payload);
                }
            } else if (!newName) {
                // Keep empty state, update button states
                editorState.componentName = '';
                dom.componentNameDisplay.classList.add('empty-state');
                _updateButtonStates();
            }
        };

        dom.componentNameDisplay.addEventListener('blur', updateComponentName);

        // Immediately update on input change
        dom.componentNameDisplay.addEventListener('input', () => {
            // Update button states immediately as user types
            _updateButtonStates();
        });

        dom.componentNameDisplay.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                e.preventDefault();
                updateComponentName();
                dom.componentNameDisplay.blur();
            } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                e.preventDefault();
                dom.componentNameDisplay.value = editorState.componentName;
                dom.componentNameDisplay.blur();
            }
        });

        // Prevent dropdown from opening when clicking on the editable name
        dom.componentNameDisplay.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
        });

        // Helper function to handle placeholder switching on focus/blur
        const setupPlaceholderSwitch = (inputElement) => {
            if (!inputElement) return;
            const defaultPlaceholder = inputElement.dataset.placeholderDefault;
            const focusPlaceholder = inputElement.dataset.placeholderFocus;

            if (defaultPlaceholder && focusPlaceholder) {
                inputElement.addEventListener('focus', () => {
                    inputElement.placeholder = focusPlaceholder;
                });
                inputElement.addEventListener('blur', () => {
                    inputElement.placeholder = defaultPlaceholder;
                });
            }
        };

        // Setup placeholder switching for all editable inputs
        setupPlaceholderSwitch(dom.componentNameDisplay);
        setupPlaceholderSwitch(dom.variantDescriptionDisplay);
        setupPlaceholderSwitch(dom.variantNameDisplay);

        // Handle variant description editing
        const updateVariantDescription = () => {
            if (!editorState.selectedVariant) return;

            const newDescription = dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.value.trim();
            if (newDescription !== editorState.selectedVariant.description) {
                editorState.selectedVariant.description = newDescription;

                // Also update in the versions array
                const version = editorState.versions.find(v => v.id === editorState.selectedVariant.id);
                if (version) {
                    version.description = newDescription;
                }

                _updateButtonStates();

                // Auto-save variant description change
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    const payload = safeClone({
                        version_id: editorState.selectedVariant.id,
                        description: newDescription
                    });
                    window.myop_cta_handler('update_variant_description', payload);
                }
            }
        };

        dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.addEventListener('blur', updateVariantDescription);

        dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.addEventListener('input', () => {
            _updateButtonStates();
        });

        dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                e.preventDefault();
                updateVariantDescription();
                dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.blur();
            } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                e.preventDefault();
                dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.value = editorState.selectedVariant ? (editorState.selectedVariant.description || '') : '';
                dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.blur();
            }
        });

        // Handle variant chevron click to toggle dropdown
        const variantChevron = document.getElementById('variant-chevron');
        if (variantChevron) {
            variantChevron.onclick = (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                const isOpening = !dom.variantDropdown.classList.contains('show');
                dom.variantDropdown.classList.toggle('show');
                dom.componentDropdown.classList.remove('show');
                dom.componentMenu.classList.remove('show');
                updateIframeOverlay();

                if (isOpening) {
                    const searchInput = document.getElementById('variant-search');
                    if (searchInput) {
                        searchInput.value = '';
                        const items = dom.variantList.querySelectorAll('.modal-dropdown-item');
                        items.forEach(item => item.style.display = 'flex');
                    }
                }
            };
        }

        // Handle variant name editing - with immediate recognition
        const updateVariantName = () => {
            // Only allow editing if a variant is selected
            if (!editorState.selectedVariant) return;

            const newName = dom.variantNameDisplay.value.trim();

            // Don't allow renaming published variants
            if (editorState.selectedVariant.published === true) {
                if (newName !== editorState.selectedVariant.name) {
                    dom.variantNameDisplay.value = editorState.selectedVariant.name;
                    _showNotification('Cannot rename published variant');
                }
                return;
            }

            if (newName && newName !== 'Untitled variant' && newName !== editorState.selectedVariant.name) {
                editorState.selectedVariant.name = newName;
                dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.remove('empty-state');
                _refreshVariantList();
                _markAsDirty(); // Mark as dirty - variant name change requires save
                _updateButtonStates();
            } else if (!newName || newName === 'Untitled variant') {
                // Restore previous name if empty
                dom.variantNameDisplay.value = editorState.selectedVariant.name;
                if (editorState.selectedVariant.name === 'Untitled variant') {
                    dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.add('empty-state');
                }
            }
        };

        dom.variantNameDisplay.addEventListener('blur', updateVariantName);

        // Immediately update on input change
        dom.variantNameDisplay.addEventListener('input', () => {
            if (!editorState.selectedVariant) return;
            // Update button states immediately as user types
            _updateButtonStates();
        });

        dom.variantNameDisplay.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            // Only allow editing if a variant is selected
            if (!editorState.selectedVariant) return;

            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                e.preventDefault();
                updateVariantName();
                dom.variantNameDisplay.blur();
            } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                e.preventDefault();
                dom.variantNameDisplay.value = editorState.selectedVariant.name;
                dom.variantNameDisplay.blur();
            }
        });

        // Prevent dropdown from opening when clicking on the editable name
        // Also enable contenteditable only when a variant is selected and not published
        dom.variantNameDisplay.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();

            // Only make it editable if a variant is selected and not published
            if (editorState.selectedVariant && editorState.selectedVariant.published !== true) {
                dom.variantNameDisplay.setAttribute('contenteditable', 'true');
            }
        });

        dom.componentMenuBtn.onclick = (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            dom.componentMenu.classList.toggle('show');
            dom.componentDropdown.classList.remove('show');
            dom.variantDropdown.classList.remove('show');
            updateIframeOverlay();
        };

        // Close menus when clicking outside
        document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (!e.target || !e.target.closest) return; // Guard against non-element targets
            if (!e.target.closest('.component-selector-wrapper')) {
                dom.componentDropdown.classList.remove('show');
                dom.componentMenu.classList.remove('show');
            }
            if (!e.target.closest('.variant-selector-wrapper')) {
                dom.variantDropdown.classList.remove('show');
            }
            updateIframeOverlay();
        });

        // Close dropdowns when clicking on iframe overlay
        if (dom.iframeOverlay) {
            dom.iframeOverlay.addEventListener('click', () => {
                dom.componentDropdown.classList.remove('show');
                dom.componentMenu.classList.remove('show');
                dom.variantDropdown.classList.remove('show');
                if (dom.runTestsDropdown) {
                    dom.runTestsDropdown.classList.remove('show');
                    if (dom.btnRunTestsDropdownToggle) {
                        dom.btnRunTestsDropdownToggle.classList.remove('open');
                    }
                }
                updateIframeOverlay();
            });
        }

        // Close modals when clicking outside (on overlay)
        [dom.addComponentModal, dom.addVariantModal, dom.dtoModal, dom.schemaModal, dom.fixItModal, dom.clipboardPermissionModal].forEach(modal => {
            if (modal) {
                modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    if (e.target === modal) {
                        modal.style.display = 'none';
                        // Clean up DTO modal state
                        if (modal === dom.dtoModal) {
                            editorState.currentEditingDto = null;
                            dom.dtoNameInput.classList.remove('error');
                        }
                    }
                });
            }
        });

        // Delete component handler
        dom.deleteComponent.onclick = () => {
            dom.componentMenu.classList.remove('show');
            // Notify host about deletion
            if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                const payload = safeClone({
                    component_id: editorState.componentId,
                    component_name: editorState.componentName
                });
                window.myop_cta_handler('component_delete', payload);
            }
        };

        // Duplicate component handler
        dom.duplicateComponent.onclick = () => {
            dom.componentMenu.classList.remove('show');
            // Notify host about duplication
            if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                const payload = safeClone({
                    component_id: editorState.componentId,
                    component_name: editorState.componentName
                });
                window.myop_cta_handler('component_duplicate', payload);
            }
        };

        // Add component handler (from menu)
        dom.addComponentMenu.onclick = () => {
            dom.componentMenu.classList.remove('show');
            // Notify host to create a new component and change URL
            if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                window.myop_cta_handler('new_component', {});
            }
        };

        // Left panel tabs switching
        const tabConfiguration = document.getElementById('tab-configuration');
        const tabMyopAgent = document.getElementById('tab-myop-agent');
        const configurationContent = document.getElementById('configuration-content');
        const myopAgentContent = document.getElementById('myop-agent-content');

        // Sparkle animation: start on hover, finish current loop before stopping
        if (tabMyopAgent) {
            let sparkleHovering = false;
            tabMyopAgent.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                sparkleHovering = true;
                tabMyopAgent.classList.add('sparkle-animating');
            });
            tabMyopAgent.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                sparkleHovering = false;
            });
            tabMyopAgent.addEventListener('animationend', (e) => {
                if (e.target.classList.contains('sparkle-large')) {
                    if (sparkleHovering) {
                        // Re-trigger animation for another loop
                        tabMyopAgent.classList.remove('sparkle-animating');
                        void tabMyopAgent.offsetWidth; // force reflow
                        tabMyopAgent.classList.add('sparkle-animating');
                    } else {
                        tabMyopAgent.classList.remove('sparkle-animating');
                    }
                }
            });
        }

        if (tabConfiguration && configurationContent) {
            tabConfiguration.onclick = () => {
                // Activate configuration tab
                tabConfiguration.classList.add('active');
                tabMyopAgent.classList.remove('active');
                configurationContent.classList.add('active');
                myopAgentContent.classList.remove('active');
            };
        }

        // MYOP Agent tab - load iframe with loading/fallback states
        if (tabMyopAgent) {
            const myopAgentIframe = document.getElementById('myop-agent-iframe');
            const myopAgentLoading = document.getElementById('myop-agent-loading');
            const myopAgentComingSoon = document.getElementById('myop-agent-coming-soon');
            let myopAgentLoaded = false;       // iframe URL was set successfully
            let myopAgentReady = false;        // agent sent ready message
            let myopAgentLoadAttempted = false;
            const MYOP_AGENT_URL_LOCAL = 'http://localhost:7777/embed';
            const MYOP_AGENT_URL_PROD = 'https://agent.myop.dev/embed';

            // Expose showMyopAgentState and myopAgentReady for the message handler
            window._myopAgentSetReady = () => {
                myopAgentReady = true;
                // Also set the outer scope variable used by sendToMyopAgent
                if (window._setMyopAgentReady) window._setMyopAgentReady();
            };
            window._myopAgentShowLoaded = () => showMyopAgentState('loaded');

        // Function for host to update isPublic state after API call succeeds
        window.updateIsPublic = (isPublic) => {
            editorState.isPublic = isPublic;
            _updateButtonStates();
        };

            const showMyopAgentState = (state) => {
                // state: 'loading' | 'loaded' | 'coming-soon'
                if (myopAgentLoading) myopAgentLoading.style.display = state === 'loading' ? 'flex' : 'none';
                if (myopAgentComingSoon) myopAgentComingSoon.style.display = state === 'coming-soon' ? 'flex' : 'none';
                if (myopAgentIframe) myopAgentIframe.style.display = state === 'loaded' ? 'block' : 'none';
            };

            // Try to load agent from a URL, returns true if successful
            const tryLoadAgent = async (url) => {
                try {
                    const controller = new AbortController();
                    const timeoutId = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 5000);

                    await fetch(url, {
                        method: 'HEAD',
                        mode: 'no-cors',
                        signal: controller.signal
                    });
                    clearTimeout(timeoutId);

                    // Server responded - load the iframe
                    myopAgentIframe.src = url;
                    // Update the global origin for postMessage communication
                    window.currentMyopAgentOrigin = new URL(url).origin;
                    return true;
                } catch (err) {
                    return false;
                }
            };

            tabMyopAgent.onclick = async (e) => {
                // Prevent switching to disabled tab
                if (tabMyopAgent.classList.contains('disabled')) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    return;
                }
                // Activate myop agent tab
                tabMyopAgent.classList.add('active');
                tabConfiguration.classList.remove('active');
                myopAgentContent.classList.add('active');
                configurationContent.classList.remove('active');

                // If already ready, just show the iframe
                if (myopAgentReady) {
                    showMyopAgentState('loaded');
                    return;
                }

                // If URL was set but not ready yet, keep showing loading
                if (myopAgentLoaded && !myopAgentReady) {
                    showMyopAgentState('loading');
                    return;
                }

                // If load already attempted and failed, show coming soon
                if (myopAgentLoadAttempted && !myopAgentLoaded) {
                    showMyopAgentState('coming-soon');
                    return;
                }

                // First time clicking - show loading and try servers in order
                showMyopAgentState('loading');
                myopAgentLoadAttempted = true;

                // Try localhost first, then production
                // Don't show 'loaded' state yet - wait for myop_agent_ready message
                if (await tryLoadAgent(MYOP_AGENT_URL_LOCAL)) {
                    myopAgentLoaded = true;
                    // Keep showing loading - will switch to 'loaded' when agent sends ready message
                } else if (await tryLoadAgent(MYOP_AGENT_URL_PROD)) {
                    myopAgentLoaded = true;
                    // Keep showing loading - will switch to 'loaded' when agent sends ready message
                } else {
                    // Both servers not reachable - show coming soon
                    showMyopAgentState('coming-soon');
                }
            };
        }

        const variantSearch = document.getElementById('variant-search');
        const variantEmpty = document.getElementById('variant-empty');
        if (variantSearch) {
            variantSearch.oninput = (e) => {
                const searchTerm = e.target.value.toLowerCase();
                const items = dom.variantList.querySelectorAll('.modal-dropdown-item');
                let visibleCount = 0;
                items.forEach(item => {
                    const text = item.textContent.toLowerCase();
                    const isVisible = text.includes(searchTerm);
                    item.style.display = isVisible ? 'flex' : 'none';
                    if (isVisible) visibleCount++;
                });
                if (variantEmpty) {
                    variantEmpty.style.display = visibleCount === 0 ? 'flex' : 'none';
                }
            };
        }

        const componentSearch = document.getElementById('component-search');
        const componentEmpty = document.getElementById('component-empty');
        if (componentSearch) {
            componentSearch.oninput = (e) => {
                const searchTerm = e.target.value.toLowerCase();
                const items = dom.componentList.querySelectorAll('.modal-dropdown-item');
                let visibleCount = 0;
                items.forEach(item => {
                    const text = item.textContent.toLowerCase();
                    const isVisible = text.includes(searchTerm);
                    item.style.display = isVisible ? 'flex' : 'none';
                    if (isVisible) visibleCount++;
                });
                if (componentEmpty) {
                    componentEmpty.style.display = visibleCount === 0 ? 'flex' : 'none';
                }
            };
        }

        // Helper function to create a new variant
        const createNewVariant = () => {
            // Close the variant dropdown
            dom.variantDropdown.classList.remove('show');

            // Get current HTML from editor to copy to new variant
            let currentHTML = '';
            if (typeof monacoEditorInstance !== 'undefined' && monacoEditorInstance) {
                currentHTML = monacoEditorInstance.getValue();
            } else if (dom.codeEditor?.value !== undefined) {
                currentHTML = dom.codeEditor.value;
            }

            // Notify the host to create the new variant
            // The host will create the variant with a proper ID, update state,
            // and call myop_init_interface with the new variant selected
            // Do NOT create locally to avoid ID mismatch between component and host
            if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                const payload = safeClone({ name: `Version ${editorState.versions.length + 1}`, code: currentHTML });
                window.myop_cta_handler('new_version', payload);
            }
        };

        dom.btnAddVariant.onclick = createNewVariant;

        // Add variant button (plus icon next to chevron)
        if (dom.addVariantBtn) {
            dom.addVariantBtn.onclick = (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                createNewVariant();
            };
        }
        
        const btnAddComponent = document.getElementById('btn-add-component');
        if (btnAddComponent) {
            btnAddComponent.onclick = () => {
                dom.componentDropdown.classList.remove('show');
                cta_action('new_component', {});
            };
        }

        dom.btnNewVariantCancel.onclick = () => {
            dom.addVariantModal.style.display = 'none';
        };

        dom.btnNewVariantCreate.onclick = () => {
            const variantName = dom.newVariantNameInput.value.trim();
            if (variantName) {
                // Get current HTML from editor to copy to new variant
                let currentHTML = '';
                if (typeof monacoEditorInstance !== 'undefined' && monacoEditorInstance) {
                    currentHTML = monacoEditorInstance.getValue();
                } else if (dom.codeEditor?.value !== undefined) {
                    currentHTML = dom.codeEditor.value;
                }
                cta_action('new_version', { name: variantName, code: currentHTML });
                dom.addVariantModal.style.display = 'none';
            }
        };

        dom.newVariantNameInput.onkeydown = (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                e.preventDefault();
                dom.btnNewVariantCreate.click();
            } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                dom.addVariantModal.style.display = 'none';
            }
        };

        dom.btnNewComponentCancel.onclick = () => {
            dom.addComponentModal.style.display = 'none';
        };

        dom.btnNewComponentCreate.onclick = () => {
            const componentName = dom.newComponentNameInput.value.trim();
            if (componentName) {
                cta_action('new_component', { name: componentName });
                dom.addComponentModal.style.display = 'none';
            }
        };

        dom.newComponentNameInput.onkeydown = (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                e.preventDefault();
                dom.btnNewComponentCreate.click();
            } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                dom.addComponentModal.style.display = 'none';
            }
        };

        // Environment Status button handler
        const btnEnvironmentStatus = document.getElementById('btn-environment-status');
        if (btnEnvironmentStatus) {
            btnEnvironmentStatus.onclick = () => {
                // Send CTA to open Environment Status modal
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    window.myop_cta_handler('open_environment_status', {});
                }
            };
        }

        // Clipboard permission modal close handler
        dom.btnClipboardPermissionClose.onclick = () => {
            dom.clipboardPermissionModal.style.display = 'none';
        };

        // Setup tooltip handlers for all buttons
        const tooltipEl = document.getElementById('button-tooltip');
        const publishCardTooltipEl = document.getElementById('publish-card-tooltip');
        let tooltipTimeout = null;
        let tooltipShowDelay = null;
        let publishCardTooltipTimeout = null;

        function showTooltip(button, mouseX, mouseY) {
            const tooltipText = button.getAttribute('data-tooltip');
            if (!tooltipText) return;

            // For Save and Publish buttons, only show tooltip when disabled
            if ((button === dom.btnSaveTop || button === dom.btnPublishTop) && !button.disabled) return;

            // Clear any existing show delay
            if (tooltipShowDelay) {
                clearTimeout(tooltipShowDelay);
                tooltipShowDelay = null;
            }

            // Delay showing tooltip by 500ms
            tooltipShowDelay = setTimeout(() => {
                tooltipEl.textContent = tooltipText;

                // Apply different styles based on button
                if (button === dom.btnSaveTop || button === dom.btnPublishTop) {
                    tooltipEl.style.whiteSpace = 'nowrap';
                    tooltipEl.style.maxWidth = 'none';
                } else {
                    tooltipEl.style.whiteSpace = 'normal';
                    tooltipEl.style.maxWidth = '200px';
                }

                // If mouse coordinates provided, position near cursor
                if (mouseX !== undefined && mouseY !== undefined) {
                    tooltipEl.style.left = mouseX + 'px';
                    tooltipEl.style.top = (mouseY + 16) + 'px';
                    tooltipEl.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
                } else {
                    const rect = button.getBoundingClientRect();
                    const tooltipWidth = tooltipEl.offsetWidth || 150; // Estimate if not rendered yet
                    const viewportWidth = window.innerWidth;

                    let leftPos = rect.left + (rect.width / 2);
                    let transform = 'translateX(-50%)';

                    // Check if tooltip would overflow on the right
                    if (leftPos + (tooltipWidth / 2) > viewportWidth - 10) {
                        // Align to right edge of button instead
                        leftPos = rect.right;
                        transform = 'translateX(-100%)';
                    }
                    // Check if tooltip would overflow on the left
                    else if (leftPos - (tooltipWidth / 2) < 10) {
                        // Align to left edge of button instead
                        leftPos = rect.left;
                        transform = 'translateX(0)';
                    }

                    tooltipEl.style.left = leftPos + 'px';
                    tooltipEl.style.top = (rect.bottom + 4) + 'px';
                    tooltipEl.style.transform = transform;
                }

                tooltipEl.classList.add('show');

                // Auto-hide after 4 seconds
                if (tooltipTimeout) clearTimeout(tooltipTimeout);
                tooltipTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                    hideTooltip();
                }, 4000);
            }, 500);
        }

        function hideTooltip() {
            // Clear show delay if tooltip hasn't appeared yet
            if (tooltipShowDelay) {
                clearTimeout(tooltipShowDelay);
                tooltipShowDelay = null;
            }
            tooltipEl.classList.remove('show');
            if (tooltipTimeout) {
                clearTimeout(tooltipTimeout);
                tooltipTimeout = null;
            }
        }

        function showPublishCardTooltip(button) {
            if (!publishCardTooltipEl) return;

            // Only show in playground mode when button is enabled
            if (editorState.mode !== 'playground' || button.disabled) return;

            const rect = button.getBoundingClientRect();

            // Position the card tooltip below the button, aligned to the right
            publishCardTooltipEl.style.top = (rect.bottom + 12) + 'px';
