            publishCardTooltipEl.style.right = (window.innerWidth - rect.right) + 'px';
            publishCardTooltipEl.style.left = 'auto';

            publishCardTooltipEl.classList.add('show');

            // Auto-hide after 4 seconds
            if (publishCardTooltipTimeout) clearTimeout(publishCardTooltipTimeout);
            publishCardTooltipTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                hidePublishCardTooltip();
            }, 4000);
        }

        function hidePublishCardTooltip() {
            if (!publishCardTooltipEl) return;
            publishCardTooltipEl.classList.remove('show');
            if (publishCardTooltipTimeout) {
                clearTimeout(publishCardTooltipTimeout);
                publishCardTooltipTimeout = null;
            }
        }

        // Add tooltip handlers for Save and Publish buttons
        dom.btnSaveTop.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(dom.btnSaveTop));
        dom.btnSaveTop.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
        dom.btnSaveTop.addEventListener('click', hideTooltip);
        dom.btnPublishTop.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
            showTooltip(dom.btnPublishTop);
            showPublishCardTooltip(dom.btnPublishTop);
        });
        dom.btnPublishTop.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
            hideTooltip();
            hidePublishCardTooltip();
        });
        dom.btnPublishTop.addEventListener('click', () => {
            hideTooltip();
            hidePublishCardTooltip();
        });

        // Add tooltip handler for Variants Status button
        if (dom.btnVariantsStatus) {
            dom.btnVariantsStatus.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(dom.btnVariantsStatus));
            dom.btnVariantsStatus.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
            dom.btnVariantsStatus.addEventListener('click', hideTooltip);
        }

        // Add tooltip handler for Environment Status button
        const btnEnvStatus = document.getElementById('btn-environment-status');
        if (btnEnvStatus) {
            btnEnvStatus.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(btnEnvStatus));
            btnEnvStatus.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
            btnEnvStatus.addEventListener('click', hideTooltip);
        }

        // Left panel tab switching (Configuration / MYOP Agent)
        const leftPanelTabs = document.querySelectorAll('.left-panel-tab');
        const leftPanel = document.querySelector('.left-panel');
        const tabSlider = document.querySelector('.left-panel-tab-slider');

        function positionTabSlider(activeTab) {
            if (!tabSlider || !activeTab) return;
            const parent = activeTab.parentElement;
            const parentRect = parent.getBoundingClientRect();
            const tabRect = activeTab.getBoundingClientRect();
            tabSlider.style.left = (tabRect.left - parentRect.left) + 'px';
            tabSlider.style.width = tabRect.width + 'px';
        }

        // Position slider on initial active tab (defer to ensure layout is ready)
        setTimeout(() => {
            const initialActiveTab = document.querySelector('.left-panel-tab.active');
            if (initialActiveTab && tabSlider) {
                tabSlider.style.transition = 'none';
                positionTabSlider(initialActiveTab);
                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    tabSlider.style.transition = '';
                });
            }
        }, 50);

        leftPanelTabs.forEach(tab => {
            tab.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const tabName = tab.dataset.tab;
                // Remove active from all tabs
                leftPanelTabs.forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
                // Add active to clicked tab
                tab.classList.add('active');
                // Slide the indicator
                positionTabSlider(tab);
                // Hide all tab contents
                document.querySelectorAll('.left-panel-tab-content').forEach(content => {
                    content.classList.remove('active');
                });
                // Show the corresponding tab content
                const contentId = tabName === 'configuration' ? 'configuration-content' : 'myop-agent-content';
                document.getElementById(contentId)?.classList.add('active');
                // Toggle class on left-panel for MYOP Agent styling
                leftPanel?.classList.toggle('myop-agent-active', tabName === 'myop-agent');
            });
        });

        // Add tooltip handlers for disabled buttons (Run tests, Chevron dropdown, Connect)
        if (dom.btnRunTests) {
            dom.btnRunTests.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(dom.btnRunTests));
            dom.btnRunTests.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
        }
        if (dom.btnRunTestsDropdownToggle) {
            dom.btnRunTestsDropdownToggle.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(dom.btnRunTestsDropdownToggle));
            dom.btnRunTestsDropdownToggle.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
        }
        // Connect button (top bar) — 3-branch flow
        if (dom.btnConnectTop) {
            dom.btnConnectTop.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (dom.btnConnectTop.disabled) return;
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler !== 'function') return;

                if (editorState.isNewComponent) {
                    // Case A: New component (no saved ID) — save first, then connect after re-init
                    editorState.pendingConnect = true;
                    _onSave();
                } else if (!editorState.hasConnected) {
                    // Case B: Existing component, not yet connected — fire both CTAs, animate
                    const typeDefs = _extractTypeDefs();
                    const payload = {
                        component_name: editorState.componentName,
                        version_id: editorState.selectedVariant?.id,
                        version_name: editorState.selectedVariant?.name,
                        typeDefs,
                        default_dto: editorState.defaultDto
                    };
                    window.myop_cta_handler('connect_requested', payload);
                    window.myop_cta_handler('connect_clicked', payload);
                    _animateToConnected();
                } else {
                    // Case C: Already connected — just fire connect_clicked
                    const typeDefs = _extractTypeDefs();
                    window.myop_cta_handler('connect_clicked', {
                        component_name: editorState.componentName,
                        version_id: editorState.selectedVariant?.id,
                        version_name: editorState.selectedVariant?.name,
                        typeDefs,
                        default_dto: editorState.defaultDto
                    });
                }
            });
            dom.btnConnectTop.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(dom.btnConnectTop));
            dom.btnConnectTop.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
        }

        // Submit button (top bar) — marketplace implementor mode
        if (dom.btnSubmitTop) {
            dom.btnSubmitTop.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (dom.btnSubmitTop.disabled) return;
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    const action = editorState.isSubmittedForReview
                        ? 'edit_submission_clicked'
                        : 'submit_for_review_clicked';
                    window.myop_cta_handler(action, {
                        component_id: editorState.componentId,
                        component_name: editorState.componentName,
                        copied_from: editorState.copiedFrom
                    });
                }
            });
            dom.btnSubmitTop.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(dom.btnSubmitTop));
            dom.btnSubmitTop.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
        }

        // Implementation request icon button (marketplace mode)
        if (dom.btnRequestTop) {
            dom.btnRequestTop.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    window.myop_cta_handler('view_implementation_request_clicked', {
                        component_id: editorState.componentId,
                        component_name: editorState.componentName,
                        copied_from: editorState.copiedFrom
                    });
                }
            });
            dom.btnRequestTop.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(dom.btnRequestTop));
            dom.btnRequestTop.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
        }

        // ==========================================
        // PLAYGROUND-SPECIFIC BUTTON HANDLERS
        // ==========================================

        // Tutorial button - opens tutorial modal
        const btnEditClaude = document.getElementById('btn-edit-claude');
        if (btnEditClaude) {
            btnEditClaude.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    window.myop_cta_handler('use_other_builders', {
                        component_name: editorState.componentName,
                        component_id: editorState.componentId
                    });
                }
            });
            btnEditClaude.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(btnEditClaude));
            btnEditClaude.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
        }

        // Copy Share URL button
        const btnCopyShare = document.getElementById('btn-copy-share');
        if (btnCopyShare) {
            btnCopyShare.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    window.myop_cta_handler('btn-copy-share', {
                        component_name: editorState.componentName,
                        component_id: editorState.componentId
                    });
                }
                // Show copied state
                btnCopyShare.classList.add('copied');
                hideTooltip();
                // Reset after 2 seconds
                setTimeout(() => {
                    btnCopyShare.classList.remove('copied');
                }, 2000);
            });
            btnCopyShare.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                if (!btnCopyShare.classList.contains('copied')) {
                    showTooltip(btnCopyShare);
                }
            });
            btnCopyShare.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
        }

        // Add tooltip handler for Add Variant button (plus icon)
        if (dom.addVariantBtn) {
            dom.addVariantBtn.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(dom.addVariantBtn));
            dom.addVariantBtn.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
            dom.addVariantBtn.addEventListener('click', hideTooltip);
        }

        // Add tooltip handler for Add Variant button (in dropdown footer)
        if (dom.btnAddVariant) {
            dom.btnAddVariant.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(dom.btnAddVariant));
            dom.btnAddVariant.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
            dom.btnAddVariant.addEventListener('click', hideTooltip);
        }

        // Add tooltip handler for Add Component button (in dropdown footer)
        const btnAddComponentTooltip = document.getElementById('btn-add-component');
        if (btnAddComponentTooltip) {
            btnAddComponentTooltip.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(btnAddComponentTooltip));
            btnAddComponentTooltip.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
            btnAddComponentTooltip.addEventListener('click', hideTooltip);
        }

        // Add tooltip handler for Add Component menu item (in dropdown menu)
        const addComponentMenuTooltip = document.getElementById('add-component-menu');
        if (addComponentMenuTooltip) {
            addComponentMenuTooltip.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(addComponentMenuTooltip));
            addComponentMenuTooltip.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
            addComponentMenuTooltip.addEventListener('click', hideTooltip);
        }

        // Add tooltip handlers for pill tab buttons
        const pillTabButtons = [
            document.getElementById('tab-preview'),
            document.getElementById('tab-code'),
            document.getElementById('tab-split'),
            document.getElementById('tab-preview-2'),
            document.getElementById('tab-code-2'),
            document.getElementById('tab-split-2')
        ];

        pillTabButtons.forEach(button => {
            if (button) {
                button.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(button));
                button.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
                button.addEventListener('click', hideTooltip);
            }
        });

        // Add tooltip handlers for copy/paste buttons
        const actionButtons = [
            dom.copyCodeBtn,
            dom.pasteReplaceBtn,
            dom.copyCodeBtn2,
            dom.pasteReplaceBtn2,
            dom.downloadCodeBtn,
            dom.downloadCodeBtn2,
            dom.previewToggleBtn
        ];

        actionButtons.forEach(button => {
            if (button) {
                button.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(button));
                button.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
                button.addEventListener('click', hideTooltip);
            }
        });

        // Event delegation for dynamically created elements with data-tooltip
        let currentTooltipTarget = null;

        document.addEventListener('mouseenter', (e) => {
            if (!e.target || !e.target.closest) return;
            // Check if hovering over trash icon - don't show tooltip in that case
            if (e.target.closest('.variant-delete-btn')) {
                currentTooltipTarget = null;
                hideTooltip();
                return;
            }
            const variantItem = e.target.closest('.modal-dropdown-item[data-tooltip]');
            const statusIcon = e.target.closest('.method-status-icon[data-tooltip]');
            const target = variantItem || statusIcon;
            if (target) {
                currentTooltipTarget = target;
                showTooltip(target, e.clientX, e.clientY);
            }
        }, true);

        document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
            if (!e.target || !e.target.closest) return;
            // Hide tooltip when moving over trash icon
            if (e.target.closest('.variant-delete-btn')) {
                if (currentTooltipTarget) {
                    currentTooltipTarget = null;
                    hideTooltip();
                }
                return;
            }
            if (currentTooltipTarget && tooltipEl.classList.contains('show')) {
                tooltipEl.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';
                tooltipEl.style.top = (e.clientY + 16) + 'px';
            }
        }, true);

        document.addEventListener('mouseleave', (e) => {
            if (!e.target || !e.target.closest) return;
            const variantItem = e.target.closest('.modal-dropdown-item[data-tooltip]');
            const statusIcon = e.target.closest('.method-status-icon[data-tooltip]');
            if (variantItem || statusIcon) {
                currentTooltipTarget = null;
                hideTooltip();
            }
        }, true);

        // Setup custom tooltip for TS Interface button
        const customTooltipEl = document.getElementById('custom-tooltip');
        let customTooltipTimeout = null;
        let customTooltipShowDelay = null;

        function showCustomTooltip(button) {
            const tooltipText = button.getAttribute('data-tooltip');
            if (!tooltipText) return;

            // Clear any existing show delay
            if (customTooltipShowDelay) {
                clearTimeout(customTooltipShowDelay);
                customTooltipShowDelay = null;
            }

            // Delay showing tooltip by 1 second
            customTooltipShowDelay = setTimeout(() => {
                const rect = button.getBoundingClientRect();
                customTooltipEl.textContent = tooltipText;
                customTooltipEl.style.left = rect.left + 'px';
                customTooltipEl.style.top = (rect.bottom + 8) + 'px';
                customTooltipEl.classList.add('show');

                // Auto-hide after 4 seconds
                if (customTooltipTimeout) clearTimeout(customTooltipTimeout);
                customTooltipTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                    hideCustomTooltip();
                }, 4000);
            }, 500);
        }

        function hideCustomTooltip() {
            // Clear show delay if tooltip hasn't appeared yet
            if (customTooltipShowDelay) {
                clearTimeout(customTooltipShowDelay);
                customTooltipShowDelay = null;
            }
            customTooltipEl.classList.remove('show');
            if (customTooltipTimeout) {
                clearTimeout(customTooltipTimeout);
                customTooltipTimeout = null;
            }
        }

        // Add tooltip handlers for TS Interface icon only
        const tsInterfaceIcon = document.getElementById('ts-interface-info-icon');
        if (tsInterfaceIcon) {
            tsInterfaceIcon.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showCustomTooltip(tsInterfaceIcon));
            tsInterfaceIcon.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideCustomTooltip);
            tsInterfaceIcon.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation(); // Prevent button click
                hideCustomTooltip();
            });
        }

        dom.btnSaveTop.onclick = _onSave;
        dom.btnPublishTop.onclick = () => {
            const isPlayground = editorState.mode === 'playground';

            // Don't allow publishing if variant is already published (only in component mode)
            if (!isPlayground && editorState.selectedVariant && editorState.selectedVariant.published) {
                return;
            }

            // In playground mode, the publish action handles both save and publish
            // In component mode, save first if dirty
            if (editorState.isDirty && !isPlayground) _onSave();

            cta_action('publish_component', {
                code: dom.codeEditor.value,
                tags: editorState.currentTags,
                component_name: editorState.componentName,
                version_id: editorState.selectedVariant.id,
                version_name: editorState.selectedVariant.name
            });

            // In playground mode, don't lock the variant after publishing
            if (isPlayground) {
                // Clear dirty state after publish
                editorState.isDirty = false;
                _updateButtonStates();
                return;
            }

            // Mark the variant as published (component mode only)
            if (editorState.selectedVariant) {
                editorState.selectedVariant.published = true;
                editorState.selectedVariant.has_releases = true;

                // Also update in the versions array
                const versionIndex = editorState.versions.findIndex(v => v.id === editorState.selectedVariant.id);
                if (versionIndex !== -1) {
                    editorState.versions[versionIndex].published = true;
                    editorState.versions[versionIndex].has_releases = true;
                }

                // Refresh the variant list to show the badge
                _refreshVariantList();
            }

            dom.btnPublishTop.textContent = 'Published';
            dom.btnPublishTop.classList.add('published');
            dom.btnPublishTop.disabled = true;
        };

        // Initialize tag selector with dropdown functionality
        if (typeof window.initTagsEventListeners === 'function') {
            window.initTagsEventListeners();
        }

        dom.codeEditor.oninput = () => {
            _markAsDirty();
            // Use _renderPreviewWithActiveDto to keep selected DTO applied
            if (typeof _renderPreviewWithActiveDto === 'function') {
                _renderPreviewWithActiveDto();
            } else {
                window.renderPreview();
            }
        };

        dom.previewToggleBtn.onclick = () => {
            if (window.xray) window.xray.toggle();
        };

        dom.copyCodeBtn.onclick = () => {
            navigator.clipboard.writeText(dom.codeEditor.value).then(() => {
                const originalHTML = dom.copyCodeBtn.innerHTML;
                dom.copyCodeBtn.innerHTML = `
                    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                        <path d="M13.5 4L6 11.5L2.5 8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                    </svg>
                `;
                dom.copyCodeBtn.style.background = 'var(--purple-5)';
                dom.copyCodeBtn.style.borderColor = 'var(--purple-10)';
                setTimeout(() => {
                    dom.copyCodeBtn.innerHTML = originalHTML;
                    dom.copyCodeBtn.style.background = '';
                    dom.copyCodeBtn.style.borderColor = '';
                }, 1000);
            });
        };

        const downloadCode = (button) => {
            const code = dom.codeEditor.value;
            const componentName = editorState.componentName || 'component';
            const variantName = editorState.selectedVariant?.name || 'default';

            // Create filename from component and variant names
            const sanitizeName = (name) => name.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9-_]/g, '_').toLowerCase();
            const filename = `${sanitizeName(componentName)}_${sanitizeName(variantName)}.html`;

            // Create blob and download
            const blob = new Blob([code], { type: 'text/html' });
            const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
            const a = document.createElement('a');
            a.href = url;
            a.download = filename;
            document.body.appendChild(a);
            a.click();
            document.body.removeChild(a);
            URL.revokeObjectURL(url);

            // Show visual feedback
            const originalHTML = button.innerHTML;
            button.innerHTML = `
                <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                    <path d="M13.5 4L6 11.5L2.5 8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                </svg>
            `;
            button.style.background = 'var(--purple-5)';
            button.style.borderColor = 'var(--purple-10)';
            setTimeout(() => {
                button.innerHTML = originalHTML;
                button.style.background = '';
                button.style.borderColor = '';
            }, 1000);
        };

        dom.downloadCodeBtn.onclick = () => downloadCode(dom.downloadCodeBtn);
        dom.downloadCodeBtn2.onclick = () => downloadCode(dom.downloadCodeBtn2);

        // Helper function to handle paste with clipboard permission check
        const handlePasteReplace = async (button) => {
            // Check clipboard permission first using Permissions API
            try {
                const permissionStatus = await navigator.permissions.query({ name: 'clipboard-read' });

                if (permissionStatus.state === 'denied') {
                    // Permission already denied - show modal immediately
                    dom.clipboardPermissionModal.style.display = 'flex';
                    return;
                }

                // Listen for permission changes while we're waiting
                const onPermissionChange = () => {
                    if (permissionStatus.state === 'granted') {
                        dom.clipboardPermissionModal.style.display = 'none';
                    } else if (permissionStatus.state === 'denied') {
                        dom.clipboardPermissionModal.style.display = 'flex';
                    }
                };
                permissionStatus.addEventListener('change', onPermissionChange);

                let resolved = false;

                // Start the clipboard read
                const clipboardPromise = navigator.clipboard.readText();

                // After one animation frame, check if we're still waiting (blocked by permission prompt)
                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                        if (!resolved && permissionStatus.state === 'prompt') {
                            // Still waiting after 2 frames and permission is being prompted
                            dom.clipboardPermissionModal.style.display = 'flex';
                        }
                    });
                });

                const text = await clipboardPromise;
                resolved = true;
                permissionStatus.removeEventListener('change', onPermissionChange);

                // Hide permission modal if it was shown (user approved permission)
                dom.clipboardPermissionModal.style.display = 'none';

                // Replace entire code content (equivalent to Cmd+A and Cmd+V)
                dom.codeEditor.value = text;

                // Mark as dirty and re-render preview
                _markAsDirty();
                window.renderPreview();
                _updateButtonStates();

                // Show visual feedback
                const originalHTML = button.innerHTML;
                button.innerHTML = `
                    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                        <path d="M13.5 4L6 11.5L2.5 8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                    </svg>
                `;
                button.style.background = 'var(--purple-5)';
                button.style.borderColor = 'var(--purple-10)';
                setTimeout(() => {
                    button.innerHTML = originalHTML;
                    button.style.background = '';
                    button.style.borderColor = '';
                }, 1000);
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Failed to read clipboard:', err);
                // Show permission modal for clipboard access errors
                dom.clipboardPermissionModal.style.display = 'flex';
            }
        };

        dom.pasteReplaceBtn.onclick = () => handlePasteReplace(dom.pasteReplaceBtn);

        dom.copyCodeBtn2.onclick = () => {

                btnToggleConsole.setAttribute('data-tooltip', isOpen ? 'Minimize console' : 'Expand console');
                // Update chevron direction

                if (icon) {

                    if (path) {

        // Console resize handler

            const onMouseMove = (e) => {
                if (!isResizing) return;
                const deltaY = startY - e.clientY;
                const newHeight = Math.min(Math.max(startHeight + deltaY, 60), window.innerHeight * 0.33);
                dom.bottomConsolePanel.style.height = newHeight + 'px';
            };

            const onMouseUp = () => {
                if (!isResizing) return;
                isResizing = false;
                document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
                document.removeEventListener('mouseup', onMouseUp);
                dom.bottomConsolePanel.classList.remove('resizing');
                document.body.style.cursor = '';
                document.body.style.userSelect = '';
                // Remove iframe overlay
                if (dom.iframeOverlay) {
                    dom.iframeOverlay.classList.remove('active');
                }
            };

            dom.consoleResizeHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                isResizing = true;
                startY = e.clientY;

                dom.bottomConsolePanel.classList.add('resizing');

    function setupLeftPanelResize() {
        const leftPanel = document.querySelector('.left-panel');
        const toggleButton = document.getElementById('left-panel-toggle');
        const resizeHandle = document.getElementById('left-panel-resize');

        const MIN_WIDTH = 318;
        const DEFAULT_WIDTH = 360;
        const MAX_WIDTH = 500;
        const MINIMIZED_WIDTH = 49;

        if (!leftPanel || !toggleButton) {
            console.warn('Left panel toggle: Missing elements', { leftPanel: !!leftPanel, toggleButton: !!toggleButton });
            return;
        }

        // Get saved width from localStorage
        function getSavedWidth() {
            const saved = localStorage.getItem('leftPanelWidth');
            if (saved) {
                const width = parseInt(saved, 10);
                if (width >= MIN_WIDTH && width <= MAX_WIDTH) {
                    return width;
                }
            }
            return DEFAULT_WIDTH;
        }

        // Save width to localStorage
        function saveWidth(width) {
            localStorage.setItem('leftPanelWidth', String(width));
        }

        // Apply width to panel
        function applyWidth(width) {
            leftPanel.style.width = width + 'px';
        }

        // Function to toggle panel visibility
        function togglePanel() {
            const isMinimized = leftPanel.classList.contains('minimized');

            // Hide tooltip immediately on click
            const tooltipElement = document.getElementById('button-tooltip');
            if (tooltipElement) {
                tooltipElement.classList.remove('show');
                tooltipElement.textContent = '';
            }

            if (isMinimized) {
                // Restore panel to saved width
                leftPanel.classList.remove('minimized');
                const savedWidth = getSavedWidth();
                applyWidth(savedWidth);
                if (resizeHandle) resizeHandle.style.display = '';
                toggleButton.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Close left panel');

                localStorage.setItem('leftPanelMinimized', 'false');
            } else {
                // Minimize panel
                leftPanel.classList.add('minimized');
                leftPanel.style.width = MINIMIZED_WIDTH + 'px';
                if (resizeHandle) resizeHandle.style.display = 'none';
                toggleButton.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Open left panel');

                localStorage.setItem('leftPanelMinimized', 'true');
            }
        }

        // Setup resize handle drag
        if (resizeHandle) {
            let isDragging = false;
            let startX = 0;
            let startWidth = 0;
            let dragShield = null;

            // Create shield to prevent iframe from capturing mouse events
            function createDragShield() {
                dragShield = document.createElement('div');
                dragShield.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;z-index:9999;cursor:col-resize;';
                document.body.appendChild(dragShield);
            }

            function removeDragShield() {
                if (dragShield && dragShield.parentNode) {
                    dragShield.parentNode.removeChild(dragShield);
                    dragShield = null;
                }
            }

            resizeHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
                if (leftPanel.classList.contains('minimized')) return;

                isDragging = true;
                startX = e.clientX;
                startWidth = leftPanel.offsetWidth;
                resizeHandle.classList.add('dragging');
                document.body.style.cursor = 'col-resize';
                document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
                createDragShield();
                e.preventDefault();
            });

            document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                if (!isDragging) return;

                const deltaX = e.clientX - startX;
                let newWidth = startWidth + deltaX;

                // Clamp to min/max
                newWidth = Math.max(MIN_WIDTH, Math.min(MAX_WIDTH, newWidth));

                applyWidth(newWidth);
            });

            document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
                if (!isDragging) return;

                isDragging = false;
                resizeHandle.classList.remove('dragging');
                document.body.style.cursor = '';
                document.body.style.userSelect = '';
                removeDragShield();

                // Save the final width
                const finalWidth = leftPanel.offsetWidth;
                saveWidth(finalWidth);
            });
        }

        // Setup tooltip for toggle button
        const tooltipEl = document.getElementById('button-tooltip');
        let panelTooltipTimeout = null;
        let panelTooltipShowDelay = null;

        function showPanelToggleTooltip() {
            const tooltipText = toggleButton.getAttribute('data-tooltip');
            if (!tooltipText || !tooltipEl) return;

            // Clear any existing show delay
            if (panelTooltipShowDelay) {
                clearTimeout(panelTooltipShowDelay);
                panelTooltipShowDelay = null;
            }

            // Delay showing tooltip by 1 second
            panelTooltipShowDelay = setTimeout(() => {
                const rect = toggleButton.getBoundingClientRect();
                const isMinimized = leftPanel.classList.contains('minimized');

                tooltipEl.textContent = tooltipText;
                tooltipEl.style.whiteSpace = 'nowrap';
                tooltipEl.style.maxWidth = 'none';

                if (isMinimized) {
                    // Position at bottom-right of the button when panel is closed
                    tooltipEl.style.left = (rect.right + 8) + 'px';
                    tooltipEl.style.top = rect.bottom + 'px';
                    tooltipEl.style.transform = 'translateY(-100%)';
                } else {
                    // Position below the button when panel is open
                    tooltipEl.style.left = rect.left + (rect.width / 2) + 'px';
                    tooltipEl.style.top = (rect.bottom + 8) + 'px';
                    tooltipEl.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
                }

                tooltipEl.classList.add('show');

                if (panelTooltipTimeout) clearTimeout(panelTooltipTimeout);
                panelTooltipTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                    tooltipEl.classList.remove('show');
                }, 4000);
            }, 500);
        }

        function hidePanelToggleTooltip() {
            // Clear show delay if tooltip hasn't appeared yet
            if (panelTooltipShowDelay) {
                clearTimeout(panelTooltipShowDelay);
                panelTooltipShowDelay = null;
            }
            if (tooltipEl) {
                tooltipEl.classList.remove('show');
            }
            if (panelTooltipTimeout) {
                clearTimeout(panelTooltipTimeout);
                panelTooltipTimeout = null;
            }
        }

        toggleButton.addEventListener('mouseenter', showPanelToggleTooltip);
        toggleButton.addEventListener('mouseleave', hidePanelToggleTooltip);

        // Toggle button click handler
        toggleButton.addEventListener('click', togglePanel);

        // Load saved state from localStorage
        const isMinimized = localStorage.getItem('leftPanelMinimized') === 'true';
        const savedWidth = getSavedWidth();

        if (isMinimized) {
            // Start with panel minimized
            leftPanel.classList.add('minimized');
            leftPanel.style.width = MINIMIZED_WIDTH + 'px';
            if (resizeHandle) resizeHandle.style.display = 'none';
            toggleButton.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Open left panel');
        } else {
            // Start with panel open at saved width
            applyWidth(savedWidth);
            toggleButton.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Close left panel');
        }
    }

    function _getCurrentVariantName() {
        // Use the currently selected variant, not currentVersionId
        return editorState.selectedVariant ? editorState.selectedVariant.name : '';
    }

    function _refreshVariantList() {
        const list = editorState.dom.variantList;
        list.innerHTML = '';

        // Show empty state if no variants
        const variantEmpty = document.getElementById('variant-empty');
        if (editorState.versions.length === 0) {
            if (variantEmpty) {
                variantEmpty.style.display = 'flex';
            }
            return;
        } else {
            if (variantEmpty) {
                variantEmpty.style.display = 'none';
            }
        }

        // Show variants in order (newest first - host sends oldest to newest)
        [...editorState.versions].reverse().forEach(version => {
            const item = document.createElement('div');
            item.className = 'modal-dropdown-item';

            // Highlight the currently selected variant
            if (editorState.selectedVariant && version.id === editorState.selectedVariant.id) {
                item.classList.add('selected');
            }

            // Create wrapper for name and badge
            const nameWrapper = document.createElement('div');
            nameWrapper.className = 'variant-name-wrapper';

            // Create text span for variant name
            const nameSpan = document.createElement('span');
            nameSpan.className = 'variant-item-name';
            nameSpan.textContent = version.name;
            nameWrapper.appendChild(nameSpan);

            // Add published badge if variant has releases or is published - only in component mode
            const isPublished = version.has_releases || version.published;
            const isComponentMode = editorState.mode !== 'playground';
            if (isPublished && isComponentMode) {
                const badge = document.createElement('span');
                badge.className = 'published-badge';
                badge.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Read only - previously published');
                badge.innerHTML = '<svg viewBox="0 0 8 8" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M2 4L3.5 5.5L6 2.5" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>';
                nameWrapper.appendChild(badge);
            }

            // Add readonly badge for playground mode (e.g., Production variant)
            if (version.readonly) {
                const badge = document.createElement('span');
                badge.className = 'readonly-badge';
                badge.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Read only');
                badge.textContent = '(read only)';
                nameWrapper.appendChild(badge);
                item.classList.add('readonly-variant');
            }

            item.appendChild(nameWrapper);

            // In playground mode, hide duplicate/delete buttons
            const isPlayground = editorState.mode === 'playground';
            const isCurrentVariant = editorState.selectedVariant && version.id === editorState.selectedVariant.id;

            // Add duplicate (copy) button - only for currently selected variant (hidden in playground)
            const duplicateBtn = document.createElement('button');
            duplicateBtn.className = 'variant-duplicate-btn';
            if (isPlayground || !isCurrentVariant) {
                duplicateBtn.style.display = 'none';
            }
            duplicateBtn.innerHTML = '<svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M5 6C5 5.44772 5.44772 5 6 5H14C14.5523 5 15 5.44772 15 6V14C15 14.5523 14.5523 15 14 15H6C5.44772 15 5 14.5523 5 14V6Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1"/><path d="M11 5V2C11 1.44772 10.5523 1 10 1H2C1.44772 1 1 1.44772 1 2V10C1 10.5523 1.44772 11 2 11H5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1"/></svg>';
            duplicateBtn.onclick = (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();

                // Get the code to duplicate:
                // - If duplicating the currently selected variant, use the code from the editor
                let codeToClone = '';
                const isCurrentVariant = editorState.selectedVariant && version.id === editorState.selectedVariant.id;

                if (isCurrentVariant && editorState.dom.codeEditor) {
                    codeToClone = editorState.dom.codeEditor.value || '';
                }

                // Close dropdown
                editorState.dom.variantDropdown.classList.remove('show');

                // Notify host to handle duplication
                // The host will create the variant with a proper ID, update state,
                // and call myop_init_interface with the duplicated variant selected
                // Do NOT create locally to avoid ID mismatch between component and host
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    const payload = safeClone({
                        original_version_id: version.id,
                        original_version_name: version.name,
                        new_version_name: version.name + ' copy',
                        code: codeToClone,
                        description: version.description || ''
                    });
                    window.myop_cta_handler('version_duplicate', payload);
                }
            };
            item.appendChild(duplicateBtn);

            // Add delete (trash) button on the right - for all variants including published (hidden in playground)
            const deleteBtn = document.createElement('button');
            deleteBtn.className = 'variant-delete-btn disabled';
            if (isPlayground) {
                deleteBtn.style.display = 'none';
            }
            deleteBtn.innerHTML = '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M13.1667 5.83331V13.8333C13.1667 14.1869 13.0262 14.5261 12.7761 14.7761C12.5261 15.0262 12.187 15.1666 11.8333 15.1666H3.83333C3.47971 15.1666 3.14057 15.0262 2.89052 14.7761C2.64048 14.5261 2.5 14.1869 2.5 13.8333V5.83331" stroke="currentColor" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/><path d="M0.5 3.16669H15.1667" stroke="currentColor" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/><path d="M5.16663 3.16667V0.5H10.5V3.16667" stroke="currentColor" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/><path d="M9.83337 7.8233L5.83337 11.8233" stroke="currentColor" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/><path d="M9.83337 11.8233L5.83337 7.8233" stroke="currentColor" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/></svg>';
            deleteBtn.onclick = (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                const deletedId = version.id;
                const index = editorState.versions.findIndex(v => v.id === version.id);

                // Check if we're deleting the currently selected variant
                const isDeletingSelected = editorState.selectedVariant && editorState.selectedVariant.id === version.id;

                if (index !== -1) {
                    editorState.versions.splice(index, 1);
                }

                // If we deleted the selected variant, select the next newer one
                // Since array is oldest-to-newest, the newer item is at index (same position after splice, or last item)
                if (isDeletingSelected && editorState.versions.length > 0) {
                    // Select the item at the same index (which is now the next newer one) or the last item if we deleted the newest
                    const newSelectedIndex = Math.min(index, editorState.versions.length - 1);
                    const newSelectedVariant = editorState.versions[newSelectedIndex];

                    editorState.selectedVariant = newSelectedVariant;
                    editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.value = newSelectedVariant.name;
                    editorState.dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.value = newSelectedVariant.description || '';

                    if (newSelectedVariant.name === 'Untitled variant') {
                        editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.add('empty-state');
                    } else {
                        editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.remove('empty-state');
                    }

                    // Notify host about the new selection
                    if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                        const payload = safeClone({ version_id: newSelectedVariant.id });
                        window.myop_cta_handler('version_selected', payload);
                    }
                } else if (editorState.versions.length === 0) {
                    // No variants left
                    editorState.selectedVariant = null;
                    editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.value = 'Untitled variant';
                    editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.add('empty-state');
                    editorState.dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.value = '';
                }

                // Mark as dirty so changes can be saved
                editorState.isDirty = true;

                _refreshVariantList();
                _updateButtonStates();

                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    const payload = safeClone({ version_id: deletedId });
                    window.myop_cta_handler('delete_variant', payload);
                }
            };
            item.appendChild(deleteBtn);

            item.onclick = () => {
                // If there are unsaved changes, store pending variant and send event to host
                // Don't switch yet - wait for host confirmation via message
                if (editorState.isDirty) {
                    editorState.pendingVariantSwitch = version;

                    // Close dropdown
                    editorState.dom.variantDropdown.classList.remove('show');

                    // Send version_selected event to host
                    // Host will show confirm dialog and send back confirmation
                    if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                        const payload = safeClone({ version_id: version.id });
                        window.myop_cta_handler('version_selected', payload);
                    }
                    return;
                }

                // No unsaved changes - switch immediately
                editorState.selectedVariant = version;

                editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.value = version.name;
                editorState.dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.value = version.description || '';

                // Apply empty-state class if variant name is untitled
                if (version.name === 'Untitled variant') {
                    editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.add('empty-state');
                } else {
                    editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.remove('empty-state');
                }

                editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.setAttribute('contenteditable', 'false');

                editorState.dom.variantDropdown.classList.remove('show');

                _refreshVariantList();
                _updateButtonStates();
                _updateEditorReadOnlyState();

                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    const payload = safeClone({ version_id: version.id });
                    window.myop_cta_handler('version_selected', payload);
                }
            };
            list.appendChild(item);
        });

    }

    function _refreshComponentList() {
        const list = editorState.dom.componentList;
        if (!list) return;

        list.innerHTML = '';

        // Show empty state if no components
        const componentEmpty = document.getElementById('component-empty');
        const components = editorState.components || [];
        if (components.length === 0) {
            if (componentEmpty) {
                componentEmpty.style.display = 'flex';
            }
            return;
        } else {
            if (componentEmpty) {
                componentEmpty.style.display = 'none';
            }
        }

        const currentItem = document.createElement('div');
        currentItem.className = 'modal-dropdown-item selected';
        const currentNameSpan = document.createElement('span');
        currentNameSpan.className = 'component-item-name';
        currentNameSpan.textContent = editorState.componentName;
        currentItem.appendChild(currentNameSpan);
        currentItem.onclick = () => {
            editorState.dom.componentDropdown.classList.remove('show');
        };
        list.appendChild(currentItem);

        // Use components list from host application
        components.forEach(component => {
            if (component.id !== editorState.componentId) {
                const item = document.createElement('div');
                item.className = 'modal-dropdown-item';
                const nameSpan = document.createElement('span');
                nameSpan.className = 'component-item-name';
                nameSpan.textContent = component.name;
                item.appendChild(nameSpan);
                item.onclick = () => {
                    editorState.dom.componentDropdown.classList.remove('show');
                    // Call CTA to switch component in host application
                    if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                        const safePayload = safeClone({
                            component_id: component.id,
                            component_name: component.name
                        });
                        window.myop_cta_handler('component_selected', safePayload);
                    }
                };
                list.appendChild(item);
            }
        });
    }

    function handlePanelClick(e) {
        const target = e.target;

        if (target.classList.contains('remove-sample-render-checkbox')) {
            const { methodName } = target.dataset;
            const isChecked = target.checked;
            if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                const payload = safeClone({ method_name: methodName, remove: isChecked });
                window.myop_cta_handler('toggle_remove_sample_render', payload);
            }
            return;
        }

        if (target.classList.contains('schema-toggle')) {
            const schemaEl = target.nextElementSibling;
            if (schemaEl && schemaEl.classList.contains('dto-schema')) {
                const isHidden = schemaEl.style.display === 'none';
                schemaEl.style.display = isHidden ? 'block' : 'none';
                target.textContent = isHidden ? 'Hide Schema' : 'View Schema';
            }
            return;
        }

        if (target.classList.contains('view-schema-btn')) {
            const methodName = target.dataset.methodName;
            openSchemaViewer(methodName);
            return;
        }

        if (target.classList.contains('test-dto-add-btn')) {
            const methodName = target.dataset.methodName;
            openDtoEditor(methodName, null, true);
            return;
        }

        // Handle clicking on the pencil icon to edit
        if (target.closest('.dto-edit-icon')) {
            const btn = target.closest('.test-dto-btn');
            if (btn) {
                const { methodName, dtoName } = btn.dataset;
                openDtoEditor(methodName, dtoName, false);
            }
            return;
        }

        // Handle clicking on the dto name or button to run
        if (target.classList.contains('test-dto-btn') || target.classList.contains('dto-name')) {
            const btn = target.closest('.test-dto-btn') || target;
            const { methodName, dtoName } = btn.dataset;

            // Handle default DTO specially
            if (btn.dataset.isDefault === 'true') {
                _runDefaultDto();
                return;
            }

            _runTestDto(methodName, dtoName);
            return;
        }
    }

    function _onConsoleHeaderClick(e) {
        const dom = editorState.dom;
        const panel = dom.ctaConsolePanel;
        const icon = document.getElementById('console-toggle-icon');
        const isHidden = panel.style.display === 'none';

        panel.style.display = isHidden ? 'block' : 'none';
        icon.textContent = isHidden ? '−' : '+';

        if (isHidden) panel.scrollTop = panel.scrollHeight;
        if (dom.ctaIndicator) {
            dom.ctaIndicator.style.display = 'none';
        }
    }

    function logToConsolePanel(type, ...args) {
        const dom = editorState.dom;
        if (dom.ctaIndicator) {
            dom.ctaIndicator.style.display = 'inline-block';
        }

        const time = new Date().toLocaleTimeString();
        const logEntry = document.createElement('div');
        logEntry.className = 'log-entry';

        const logTime = document.createElement('div');
        logTime.className = 'log-time';

        const logBody = document.createElement('div');
        logBody.className = 'log-body';

        if (type === 'cta') {
            const [methodName, cta_id, payload] = args;
            logTime.textContent = `[${time}] from ${methodName} (CTA)`;
            logBody.textContent = `ID: ${cta_id}, Payload: ${JSON.stringify(payload)}`;
            logBody.classList.add('log-cta');
        } else {
            logTime.textContent = `[${time}] (Preview Console)`;
            logBody.textContent = args.map(arg => {
                if (typeof arg === 'object' && arg !== null) {
                    try {
                        return JSON.stringify(arg, null, 2);
                    } catch (e) {
                        return arg.toString();
                    }
                }
                return String(arg);
            }).join(' ');
            logBody.classList.add(`log-${type}`);
        }

        logEntry.appendChild(logTime);
        logEntry.appendChild(logBody);
        if (dom.ctaConsoleContent) {
            dom.ctaConsoleContent.appendChild(logEntry);
        }
        if (dom.ctaConsolePanel) {
            dom.ctaConsolePanel.scrollTop = dom.ctaConsolePanel.scrollHeight;
        }
    }


    function showTab(tabName) {
        const dom = editorState.dom;
        const tabPreview2 = document.getElementById('tab-preview-2');
        const tabCode2 = document.getElementById('tab-code-2');
        const tabSplit2 = document.getElementById('tab-split-2');
        const mainPanel = document.querySelector('.main-panel');
        const codeContent = document.getElementById('code-content');
        const previewContent = document.getElementById('preview-content');

// Remove existing divider if it exists
        const existingDivider = mainPanel.querySelector('.split-view-divider');
        if (existingDivider) existingDivider.remove();

// Reset widths for non-split modes
        codeContent.style.width = '';
        previewContent.style.width = '';

        editorState.activeTab = tabName;

        if (tabName === 'split') {
// SPLIT VIEW MODE - חצי קוד חצי פריוויו
            mainPanel.classList.add('split-view');
            dom.codeContent.classList.add('active');
            dom.previewContent.classList.add('active');
            dom.tabCode.classList.add('active');
            dom.tabPreview.classList.add('active');
            if (dom.tabSplit) dom.tabSplit.classList.add('active');
            if (tabSplit2) tabSplit2.classList.add('active');
            if (tabCode2) tabCode2.classList.remove('active');
            if (tabPreview2) tabPreview2.classList.remove('active');

// Hide preview action buttons in split mode
            dom.copyCodeBtn2.style.display = 'none';
            dom.pasteReplaceBtn2.style.display = 'none';
            dom.previewToggleBtn.style.display = 'none';

            window.setupSplitView();
            window.renderPreview();

        } else if (tabName === 'code') {
// CODE ONLY MODE - רק קוד על כל הבמה
            mainPanel.classList.remove('split-view');
            dom.codeContent.classList.add('active');
            dom.previewContent.classList.remove('active');
            dom.tabCode.classList.add('active');
            dom.tabPreview.classList.remove('active');
            if (dom.tabSplit) dom.tabSplit.classList.remove('active');
            if (tabSplit2) tabSplit2.classList.remove('active');
            if (tabCode2) tabCode2.classList.add('active');
            if (tabPreview2) tabPreview2.classList.remove('active');

// Hide preview action buttons
            dom.copyCodeBtn2.style.display = 'none';
            dom.pasteReplaceBtn2.style.display = 'none';
            dom.previewToggleBtn.style.display = 'none';

        } else {
// PREVIEW ONLY MODE - רק פריוויו על כל הבמה
            mainPanel.classList.remove('split-view');
            dom.codeContent.classList.remove('active');
            dom.previewContent.classList.add('active');
            dom.tabCode.classList.remove('active');
            dom.tabPreview.classList.add('active');
            if (dom.tabSplit) dom.tabSplit.classList.remove('active');
            if (tabSplit2) tabSplit2.classList.remove('active');
            if (tabCode2) tabCode2.classList.remove('active');
            if (tabPreview2) tabPreview2.classList.add('active');

// Show preview action buttons
            dom.copyCodeBtn2.style.display = 'flex';
            dom.pasteReplaceBtn2.style.display = 'flex';
            dom.previewToggleBtn.style.display = 'flex';

            window.renderPreview();
        }
    }

    function _updateSectionStatusIndicators() {
        const successIconSVG = '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M8 15C11.866 15 15 11.866 15 8C15 4.13401 11.866 1 8 1C4.13401 1 1 4.13401 1 8C1 11.866 4.13401 15 8 15Z" stroke="#00C950" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/><path d="M5 8L7 10L11 6" stroke="#00C950" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>';
        const errorIconSVG = `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 15 15" fill="none">
  <path d="M7.5 14.5C11.366 14.5 14.5 11.366 14.5 7.5C14.5 3.63401 11.366 0.5 7.5 0.5C3.63401 0.5 0.5 3.63401 0.5 7.5C0.5 11.366 3.63401 14.5 7.5 14.5Z" stroke="#FF4E00" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/>
  <path d="M7.50013 11.3182C7.85159 11.3182 8.1365 11.0333 8.1365 10.6818C8.1365 10.3304 7.85159 10.0454 7.50013 10.0454C7.14868 10.0454 6.86377 10.3304 6.86377 10.6818C6.86377 11.0333 7.14868 11.3182 7.50013 11.3182Z" fill="#FF4E00" style="stroke-width: 0;"/>
  <path d="M7.5 4.31818V8.13636" stroke="#FF4E00" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/>
</svg>`;

        let inputSuccessCount = 0;
        let inputErrorCount = 0;
        let outputSuccessCount = 0;
        let outputErrorCount = 0;

        const inputStatus = document.getElementById('input-methods-status');
        if (inputStatus) {
            editorState.input_methods_cache.forEach(method => {
                const statusIcon = editorState.dom.inputMethodsList?.querySelector(`.method-status-icon[data-method-name="${method.method_name}"]`);
                if (statusIcon) {
                    if (statusIcon.classList.contains('success')) inputSuccessCount++;
                    else if (statusIcon.classList.contains('error')) inputErrorCount++;
                }
            });

            inputStatus.innerHTML = '';
            if (inputSuccessCount > 0 && inputErrorCount === 0) {
                inputStatus.innerHTML = `<span class="status-dot success" data-tooltip="detected function: myop_init_interface">${successIconSVG}</span>`;
            } else if (inputErrorCount > 0 && inputSuccessCount === 0) {
                inputStatus.innerHTML = `<span class="status-dot error" data-tooltip="function not detected">${errorIconSVG}</span>`;
            }
        }

        const outputStatus = document.getElementById('output-methods-status');
        if (outputStatus) {
            // Check output methods from cached status (updated by _updateMethodStatuses)
            const iframeWindow = editorState.dom.previewFrame?.contentWindow;
            if (iframeWindow) {
                editorState.output_methods_cache.forEach(method => {
                    const isSuccess = typeof iframeWindow[method.method_name] === 'function';
                    if (isSuccess) outputSuccessCount++;
                    else outputErrorCount++;
                });
            }

            outputStatus.innerHTML = '';
            if (outputSuccessCount > 0 && outputErrorCount === 0) {
                outputStatus.innerHTML = `<span class="status-dot success" data-tooltip="detected function: myop_cta_handler">${successIconSVG}</span>`;
            } else if (outputErrorCount > 0 && outputSuccessCount === 0) {
                outputStatus.innerHTML = `<span class="status-dot error" data-tooltip="function not detected">${errorIconSVG}</span>`;
            }
        }

        // Update DATA FLOW header status (shown only when collapsed)
        const dataFlowStatus = document.getElementById('data-flow-status');
        if (dataFlowStatus) {
            const totalSuccessCount = inputSuccessCount + outputSuccessCount;
            const totalErrorCount = inputErrorCount + outputErrorCount;

            dataFlowStatus.innerHTML = '';
            if (totalSuccessCount > 0 && totalErrorCount === 0) {
                dataFlowStatus.innerHTML = `<span class="status-dot success" data-tooltip="all functions detected">${successIconSVG}</span>`;
            } else if (totalErrorCount > 0 && totalSuccessCount === 0) {
                dataFlowStatus.innerHTML = `<span class="status-dot error" data-tooltip="functions not detected">${errorIconSVG}</span>`;
            } else if (totalErrorCount > 0 && totalSuccessCount > 0) {
                dataFlowStatus.innerHTML = `<span class="status-dot error" data-tooltip="some functions not detected">${errorIconSVG}</span>`;
            }
        }
    }

    function _updateMethodStatuses(iframeWindow) {
        if (!editorState.dom.inputMethodsList) return;

        let hasError = false;

        editorState.input_methods_cache.forEach(method => {
            const statusIcon = editorState.dom.inputMethodsList.querySelector(`.method-status-icon[data-method-name="${method.method_name}"]`);
            if (!statusIcon) return;

            let isSuccess = typeof iframeWindow[method.method_name] === 'function';

            if (isSuccess) {
                statusIcon.classList.add('success');
                statusIcon.classList.remove('error');
                statusIcon.innerHTML = '<svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M8 15C11.866 15 15 11.866 15 8C15 4.13401 11.866 1 8 1C4.13401 1 1 4.13401 1 8C1 11.866 4.13401 15 8 15Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/><path d="M5 8L7 10L11 6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>';
                statusIcon.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Success: Method found in preview');
            } else {
                statusIcon.classList.add('error');
                statusIcon.classList.remove('success');
                statusIcon.innerHTML = '<svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 15 15" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M7.5 14.5C11.366 14.5 14.5 11.366 14.5 7.5C14.5 3.63401 11.366 0.5 7.5 0.5C3.63401 0.5 0.5 3.63401 0.5 7.5C0.5 11.366 3.63401 14.5 7.5 14.5Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/><path d="M7.50013 11.3182C7.85159 11.3182 8.1365 11.0333 8.1365 10.6818C8.1365 10.3304 7.85159 10.0454 7.50013 10.0454C7.14868 10.0454 6.86377 10.3304 6.86377 10.6818C6.86377 11.0333 7.14868 11.3182 7.50013 11.3182Z" fill="currentColor"/><path d="M7.5 4.31818V8.13636" stroke="currentColor" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/></svg>';
                statusIcon.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Error: Method not found in preview');
                hasError = true;
            }
        });

        // Check output methods for errors (but don't display icons - just update header status)
        editorState.output_methods_cache.forEach(method => {
            let isSuccess = typeof iframeWindow[method.method_name] === 'function';
            if (!isSuccess) {
                hasError = true;
            }
        });

        editorState.hasError = hasError;
        editorState.dom.btnHowToFix.style.display = hasError ? 'block' : 'none';
        _updateSectionStatusIndicators();
        _updateButtonStates();
    }

    function injectFrameFunctions() {
        const cta_action = (action_id, payload) => {
            if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                const safePayload = safeClone(payload);
                window.myop_cta_handler(action_id, safePayload);
            } else {
                console.warn("Host function 'myop_cta_handler' is not defined.");
            }
        };

        try {
            const iframeWindow = editorState.dom.previewFrame.contentWindow;
            if (!iframeWindow) return;

            // Override iframe console to capture logs in the console panel
            const iframeConsole = iframeWindow.console;
            iframeWindow.console = {
                ...iframeConsole,
                log: (...args) => {
                    const safeArgs = args.map(arg => safeClone(arg));
                    logToConsolePanel('log', ...safeArgs);
                    iframeConsole.log.apply(iframeConsole, args);
                },
                warn: (...args) => {
                    const safeArgs = args.map(arg => safeClone(arg));
                    logToConsolePanel('warn', ...safeArgs);
                    iframeConsole.warn.apply(iframeConsole, args);
                },
                error: (...args) => {
                    const safeArgs = args.map(arg => safeClone(arg));
                    logToConsolePanel('error', ...safeArgs);
                    iframeConsole.error.apply(iframeConsole, args);
                },
                info: (...args) => {
                    const safeArgs = args.map(arg => safeClone(arg));
                    logToConsolePanel('info', ...safeArgs);
                    iframeConsole.info.apply(iframeConsole, args);
                }
            };

            _updateMethodStatuses(iframeWindow);

            // Capture default DTO from component's mock data after it executes.
            // Uses the Myop getter pattern: myop_init_interface() with no args returns current data.
            setTimeout(() => {
                try {
                    const currentIframeWindow = editorState.dom.previewFrame.contentWindow;
                    console.log('[Default DTO] Current activeDtoRun:', editorState.activeDtoRun);

                    // Read current data via the component's getter (no-args call)
                    let capturedData = null;
                    if (currentIframeWindow && typeof currentIframeWindow.myop_init_interface === 'function') {
                        capturedData = currentIframeWindow.myop_init_interface();
                    }
                    console.log('[Default DTO] Captured via getter:', capturedData);

                    if (capturedData) {
                        const clonedData = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(capturedData));

                        // Update defaultDto when in default mode (myop_preview script ran naturally).
                        // Skip when a custom DTO is active since the data would be injected, not mock.
                        const isDefaultMode = !editorState.activeDtoRun || editorState.activeDtoRun.dtoName === '__default__';
                        if (isDefaultMode) {
                            editorState.defaultDto = {
                                methodName: 'myop_init_interface',
                                data: clonedData
                            };
                            console.log('[Default DTO] Updated defaultDto:', editorState.defaultDto);
                        }

                        // Pre-select default DTO only if no other DTO is active
                        if (!editorState.activeDtoRun) {
                            editorState.activeDtoRun = { methodName: 'myop_init_interface', dtoName: '__default__' };
                            console.log('[Default DTO] Set activeDtoRun to default');
                        }

                        _refreshTestDtoList('myop_init_interface');
                        console.log('[Default DTO] Refreshed list');
                    } else {
                        console.log('[Default DTO] No mock data found');
                        if (!editorState.defaultDto) {
                            editorState.defaultDto = null;
                        }
                    }
                } catch (e) {
                    console.warn('Could not capture default DTO:', e);
                }
            }, 600); // Wait for mock data script to execute

            editorState.output_methods_cache.forEach(method => {
                iframeWindow[method.method_name] = (cta_id, cta_payload) => {
                    const safePayload = safeClone(cta_payload);
                    logToConsolePanel('cta', method.method_name, cta_id, safePayload);
                    cta_action('component_output', {
                        output_function_name: method.method_name,
                        cta_id: cta_id,
                        cta_payload: safePayload
                    });
                };
            });

            // Note: DTO injection is now handled by the myop_dto script injected in preview.js
            // The pendingDtoRun is consumed there and no longer needs to be handled here

        } catch (e) {
            console.error("Error injecting functions into iframe:", e);
        }
    }

    function _onSave() {
        // For new components, allow saving without changes
        if (!editorState.isDirty && !editorState.isNewComponent) return;

        // Prevent saving if no variant is selected
        if (!editorState.selectedVariant) {
            alert('Please select a variant before saving.');
            return;
        }

        // Save the changes
        if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
            const payload = safeClone({
                code: editorState.dom.codeEditor.value,
                tags: editorState.currentTags,
                component_name: editorState.componentName,
                version_id: editorState.selectedVariant.id,
                version_name: editorState.selectedVariant.name
            });
            console.log('[_onSave] Saving variant:', editorState.selectedVariant.id, 'name:', editorState.selectedVariant.name);
            console.log('[_onSave] Is temp ID:', editorState.selectedVariant.id.startsWith('variant_'));
            window.myop_cta_handler('save_code', payload);
        } else {
            console.warn("Host function 'myop_cta_handler' is not defined.");
        }

        editorState.isDirty = false;
        _updateButtonStates();

        // Notify host that changes have been saved (isDirty is now false)
        if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
            const payload = safeClone({
                isDirty: false,
                component_name: editorState.componentName,
                version_id: editorState.selectedVariant?.id,
                version_name: editorState.selectedVariant?.name
            });
            window.myop_cta_handler('unsaved_changes', payload);
        }
    }

    function _updateButtonStates() {
        const dom = editorState.dom;
        const isPlayground = editorState.mode === 'playground';

        // Check if component or variant names are empty
        const isComponentNameEmpty = !editorState.componentName ||
            editorState.componentName.trim() === '';
        const isVariantNameEmpty = !editorState.selectedVariant ||
            !editorState.selectedVariant.name ||
            editorState.selectedVariant.name.trim() === '' ||
            editorState.selectedVariant.name === 'Untitled variant';

        // Check if the current variant is locked (has releases) - but NOT in playground mode
        const hasReleases = !isPlayground && editorState.releases && editorState.releases.length > 0;

        // ==========================================
        // PLAYGROUND MODE: Save button always disabled
        // ==========================================
        if (isPlayground) {
            dom.btnSaveTop.disabled = true;
            dom.btnSaveTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Disabled in Playground');
        } else {
            // Update Save button
            // For new components, allow saving without changes (isDirty not required)
            const requiresDirty = !editorState.isNewComponent;
            dom.btnSaveTop.disabled = (requiresDirty && !editorState.isDirty) || !editorState.selectedVariant || isComponentNameEmpty || isVariantNameEmpty;

            // "Saved" only when disabled because there are no changes (clean state)
            const isCleanDisabled = dom.btnSaveTop.disabled && !isComponentNameEmpty && !isVariantNameEmpty && editorState.selectedVariant;
            dom.btnSaveTop.textContent = isCleanDisabled ? 'Saved' : 'Save';

            // Set tooltip for save button
            if (isComponentNameEmpty) {
                dom.btnSaveTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Add component name first');
            } else if (isVariantNameEmpty) {
                dom.btnSaveTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Add variant name first');
            } else if (!editorState.selectedVariant) {
                dom.btnSaveTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Select a variant first');
            } else if (!editorState.isDirty && !editorState.isNewComponent) {
                dom.btnSaveTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'No changes to save');
            } else {
                dom.btnSaveTop.removeAttribute('data-tooltip');
            }
        }

        // ==========================================
        // PLAYGROUND MODE: Publish button (saves and publishes)
        // ==========================================
        if (isPlayground) {
            // In playground mode, publish is enabled when there's a selected variant and no data flow errors
            const canPublishPlayground = editorState.selectedVariant && !editorState.hasError;
            dom.btnPublishTop.disabled = !canPublishPlayground;

            if (editorState.hasError) {
                dom.btnPublishTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Invalid data flow. Fix in sidebar.');
            } else {
                dom.btnPublishTop.removeAttribute('data-tooltip');
            }
        } else {
            // Update Publish button
            // If variant has ANY releases, it's locked and should show "Published"
            // Disable publish button if variant has any releases (locked state) or if it's a new component (must save first)
            const canPublish = !editorState.isDirty && !editorState.hasError && editorState.selectedVariant && !hasReleases && !isComponentNameEmpty && !isVariantNameEmpty && !editorState.isNewComponent;
            dom.btnPublishTop.disabled = !canPublish;

            // Set tooltip for publish button
            if (editorState.isNewComponent) {
                dom.btnPublishTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Save component first');
            } else if (isComponentNameEmpty) {
                dom.btnPublishTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Add component name first');
            } else if (isVariantNameEmpty) {
                dom.btnPublishTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Add variant name first');
            } else if (!editorState.selectedVariant) {
                dom.btnPublishTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Select a variant first');
            } else if (hasReleases) {
                dom.btnPublishTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Locked after publish');
            } else if (editorState.isDirty) {
                dom.btnPublishTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Save changes first');
            } else if (editorState.hasError) {
                dom.btnPublishTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Invalid data flow. Fix in sidebar.');
            } else {
                dom.btnPublishTop.removeAttribute('data-tooltip');
            }
        }

        // Marketplace implementor mode
        const isMarketplace = !!editorState.copiedFrom;

        // Update publish button text and visibility based on state and mode
        if (isMarketplace && !isPlayground) {
            // Marketplace mode: hide Publish (Submit replaces it)
            dom.btnPublishTop.style.display = 'none';
            dom.btnPublishTop.classList.remove('published');
        } else if (isPlayground) {
            // Playground mode: show "Preview live", always visible
            dom.btnPublishTop.textContent = 'Preview live';
            dom.btnPublishTop.classList.remove('published');
            dom.btnPublishTop.style.display = '';
        } else if (hasReleases) {
            dom.btnPublishTop.textContent = 'Published';
            dom.btnPublishTop.classList.add('published');
            dom.btnPublishTop.style.display = '';
        } else if (editorState.hasConnected) {
            // Component mode, connected: show Publish button
            dom.btnPublishTop.textContent = `Publish to ${editorState.firstEnvName || 'Environment'}`;
            dom.btnPublishTop.classList.remove('published');
            dom.btnPublishTop.style.display = '';
        } else {
            // Component mode, not connected: hide Publish button
            dom.btnPublishTop.style.display = 'none';
            dom.btnPublishTop.classList.remove('published');
        }

        if (dom.btnConnectTop) {
            if (isPlayground) {
                // Playground mode: Connect always enabled and visible, white theme
                dom.btnConnectTop.style.display = '';
                dom.btnConnectTop.disabled = false;
                dom.btnConnectTop.removeAttribute('data-tooltip');
            } else if (editorState.isNewComponent) {
                // New component: Connect enabled — clicking it will save first
                dom.btnConnectTop.style.display = '';
                dom.btnConnectTop.disabled = false;
                dom.btnConnectTop.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Save & connect');
            } else {
                // Existing component: Connect enabled
                dom.btnConnectTop.style.display = '';
                dom.btnConnectTop.disabled = false;
