    // Inject visual edit styles into iframe for mention highlight (reuses VISUAL_EDIT_STYLES)
    function ensureMentionHighlightStyles(doc) {
        if (!doc.getElementById('visual-edit-styles')) {
            const style = doc.createElement('style');
            style.id = 'visual-edit-styles';
            style.textContent = VISUAL_EDIT_STYLES;
            doc.head.appendChild(style);
        }
        mentionHighlightStylesInjected = true;
    }

    // Clear mention highlight using visual edit cleanup
    function clearMentionHighlight(doc) {
        if (doc.defaultView && doc.defaultView.__hideInspectTooltip) {
            doc.defaultView.__hideInspectTooltip();
        } else {
            // Fallback: just hide elements (don't remove - breaks cached references)
            const tooltip = doc.getElementById('visual-edit-inspect-tooltip');
            if (tooltip) tooltip.style.display = 'none';
            const overlay = doc.getElementById('visual-edit-box-overlay');
            if (overlay) overlay.style.display = 'none';
        }
        mentionHighlightedElement = null;
    }

    // Minimal script to expose tooltip functions (without event handlers)
    const MENTION_HIGHLIGHT_SCRIPT = `
    (function() {
        if (window.__showInspectTooltip) return; // Already injected

        let inspectTooltip = null;
        let boxOverlay = null;

        function createInspectTooltip() {
            // Check if cached element is still in DOM
            if (inspectTooltip && document.body.contains(inspectTooltip)) {
                return inspectTooltip;
            }
            // Try to find existing element first
            inspectTooltip = document.getElementById('visual-edit-inspect-tooltip');
            if (!inspectTooltip) {
                inspectTooltip = document.createElement('div');
                inspectTooltip.id = 'visual-edit-inspect-tooltip';
                inspectTooltip.style.display = 'none';
                document.body.appendChild(inspectTooltip);
            }
            return inspectTooltip;
        }

        function createBoxOverlay() {
            // Check if cached element is still in DOM
            if (boxOverlay && document.body.contains(boxOverlay)) {
                return boxOverlay;
            }
            // Try to find existing element first
            boxOverlay = document.getElementById('visual-edit-box-overlay');
            if (!boxOverlay) {
                boxOverlay = document.createElement('div');
                boxOverlay.id = 'visual-edit-box-overlay';
                boxOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                document.body.appendChild(boxOverlay);
            }
            return boxOverlay;
        }

        function showBoxOverlay(el) {
            const overlay = createBoxOverlay();
            const computed = window.getComputedStyle(el);
            const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();

            const marginTop = parseFloat(computed.marginTop) || 0;
            const marginRight = parseFloat(computed.marginRight) || 0;
            const marginBottom = parseFloat(computed.marginBottom) || 0;
            const marginLeft = parseFloat(computed.marginLeft) || 0;
            const borderTop = parseFloat(computed.borderTopWidth) || 0;
            const borderRight = parseFloat(computed.borderRightWidth) || 0;
            const borderBottom = parseFloat(computed.borderBottomWidth) || 0;
            const borderLeft = parseFloat(computed.borderLeftWidth) || 0;
            const paddingTop = parseFloat(computed.paddingTop) || 0;
            const paddingRight = parseFloat(computed.paddingRight) || 0;
            const paddingBottom = parseFloat(computed.paddingBottom) || 0;
            const paddingLeft = parseFloat(computed.paddingLeft) || 0;

            const contentWidth = rect.width - paddingLeft - paddingRight - borderLeft - borderRight;
            const contentHeight = rect.height - paddingTop - paddingBottom - borderTop - borderBottom;
            const totalWidth = rect.width + marginLeft + marginRight;
            const totalHeight = rect.height + marginTop + marginBottom;

            let html = '';
            if (marginTop > 0) html += '<div class="box-margin" style="left:0;top:0;width:' + totalWidth + 'px;height:' + marginTop + 'px;"></div>';
            if (marginBottom > 0) html += '<div class="box-margin" style="left:0;bottom:0;width:' + totalWidth + 'px;height:' + marginBottom + 'px;"></div>';
            if (marginLeft > 0) html += '<div class="box-margin" style="left:0;top:' + marginTop + 'px;width:' + marginLeft + 'px;height:' + rect.height + 'px;"></div>';
            if (marginRight > 0) html += '<div class="box-margin" style="right:0;top:' + marginTop + 'px;width:' + marginRight + 'px;height:' + rect.height + 'px;"></div>';

            const borderBoxLeft = marginLeft, borderBoxTop = marginTop;
            if (borderTop > 0) html += '<div class="box-border" style="left:' + borderBoxLeft + 'px;top:' + borderBoxTop + 'px;width:' + rect.width + 'px;height:' + borderTop + 'px;"></div>';
            if (borderBottom > 0) html += '<div class="box-border" style="left:' + borderBoxLeft + 'px;top:' + (borderBoxTop + rect.height - borderBottom) + 'px;width:' + rect.width + 'px;height:' + borderBottom + 'px;"></div>';
            if (borderLeft > 0) html += '<div class="box-border" style="left:' + borderBoxLeft + 'px;top:' + (borderBoxTop + borderTop) + 'px;width:' + borderLeft + 'px;height:' + (rect.height - borderTop - borderBottom) + 'px;"></div>';
            if (borderRight > 0) html += '<div class="box-border" style="left:' + (borderBoxLeft + rect.width - borderRight) + 'px;top:' + (borderBoxTop + borderTop) + 'px;width:' + borderRight + 'px;height:' + (rect.height - borderTop - borderBottom) + 'px;"></div>';

            const paddingBoxLeft = marginLeft + borderLeft, paddingBoxTop = marginTop + borderTop;
            const paddingBoxWidth = rect.width - borderLeft - borderRight, paddingBoxHeight = rect.height - borderTop - borderBottom;
            if (paddingTop > 0) html += '<div class="box-padding" style="left:' + paddingBoxLeft + 'px;top:' + paddingBoxTop + 'px;width:' + paddingBoxWidth + 'px;height:' + paddingTop + 'px;"></div>';
            if (paddingBottom > 0) html += '<div class="box-padding" style="left:' + paddingBoxLeft + 'px;top:' + (paddingBoxTop + paddingBoxHeight - paddingBottom) + 'px;width:' + paddingBoxWidth + 'px;height:' + paddingBottom + 'px;"></div>';
            if (paddingLeft > 0) html += '<div class="box-padding" style="left:' + paddingBoxLeft + 'px;top:' + (paddingBoxTop + paddingTop) + 'px;width:' + paddingLeft + 'px;height:' + (paddingBoxHeight - paddingTop - paddingBottom) + 'px;"></div>';
            if (paddingRight > 0) html += '<div class="box-padding" style="left:' + (paddingBoxLeft + paddingBoxWidth - paddingRight) + 'px;top:' + (paddingBoxTop + paddingTop) + 'px;width:' + paddingRight + 'px;height:' + (paddingBoxHeight - paddingTop - paddingBottom) + 'px;"></div>';

            const contentLeft = marginLeft + borderLeft + paddingLeft, contentTop = marginTop + borderTop + paddingTop;
            html += '<div class="box-content" style="left:' + contentLeft + 'px;top:' + contentTop + 'px;width:' + contentWidth + 'px;height:' + contentHeight + 'px;"></div>';

            overlay.innerHTML = html;
            overlay.style.left = (rect.left - marginLeft) + 'px';
            overlay.style.top = (rect.top - marginTop) + 'px';
            overlay.style.width = totalWidth + 'px';
            overlay.style.height = totalHeight + 'px';
            overlay.style.display = 'block';
        }

        function getElementInfo(el) {
            const computed = window.getComputedStyle(el);
            const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
            let selector = el.tagName.toLowerCase();
            if (el.id) selector += '#' + el.id;
            if (el.className && typeof el.className === 'string') {
                const classes = el.className.split(' ').filter(c => c && !c.startsWith('visual-edit'));
                if (classes.length > 0) selector += '.' + classes.join('.');
            }
            const bgColor = computed.backgroundColor;
            const textColor = computed.color;
            const padding = [computed.paddingTop, computed.paddingRight, computed.paddingBottom, computed.paddingLeft].join(' ');
            const margin = [computed.marginTop, computed.marginRight, computed.marginBottom, computed.marginLeft].join(' ');

            let html = '<div class="tooltip-selector">' + selector + '</div>';
            html += '<div class="tooltip-dimensions">' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' \\u00d7 ' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' px</div>';
            html += '<div class="tooltip-row"><span class="tooltip-label">bg:</span><span class="tooltip-value"><span class="tooltip-color-swatch" style="background:' + bgColor + '"></span>' + bgColor + '</span></div>';
            html += '<div class="tooltip-row"><span class="tooltip-label">color:</span><span class="tooltip-value"><span class="tooltip-color-swatch" style="background:' + textColor + '"></span>' + textColor + '</span></div>';
            html += '<div class="tooltip-row"><span class="tooltip-label">font:</span><span class="tooltip-value">' + computed.fontSize + ' ' + computed.fontWeight + ' ' + computed.fontFamily.split(',')[0] + '</span></div>';
            html += '<div class="tooltip-section"><div class="tooltip-box-model"><span><span class="box-label">padding:</span> <span class="box-value">' + padding + '</span></span></div>';
            html += '<div class="tooltip-box-model"><span><span class="box-label">margin:</span> <span class="box-value">' + margin + '</span></span></div></div>';
            return html;
        }

        window.__showInspectTooltip = function(el) {
            if (!el) return;
            const tooltip = createInspectTooltip();
            tooltip.innerHTML = getElementInfo(el);
            tooltip.style.display = 'block';
            const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
            const padding = 15;
            let left = rect.right + padding;
            let top = rect.top;
            const tRect = tooltip.getBoundingClientRect();
            if (left + tRect.width > window.innerWidth - padding) left = rect.left - tRect.width - padding;
            if (top + tRect.height > window.innerHeight - padding) top = window.innerHeight - tRect.height - padding;
            tooltip.style.left = Math.max(padding, left) + 'px';
            tooltip.style.top = Math.max(padding, top) + 'px';
            showBoxOverlay(el);
        };

        window.__hideInspectTooltip = function() {
            if (inspectTooltip) inspectTooltip.style.display = 'none';
            if (boxOverlay) boxOverlay.style.display = 'none';
        };
    })();
    `;

    // Inject the minimal highlight script
    function ensureMentionHighlightScript(doc) {
        if (!doc.getElementById('mention-highlight-script')) {
            const script = doc.createElement('script');
            script.id = 'mention-highlight-script';
            script.textContent = MENTION_HIGHLIGHT_SCRIPT;
            doc.body.appendChild(script);
        }
    }

    // Highlight a selector in the preview iframe (for mentions menu hover)
    function highlightSelectorInPreview(selector) {
        const previewIframe = document.getElementById('preview-frame');
        if (!previewIframe || !previewIframe.contentDocument) {
            return;
        }

        const doc = previewIframe.contentDocument;
        const win = previewIframe.contentWindow;

        // If no selector, just clear and return
        if (!selector) {
            clearMentionHighlight(doc);
            return;
        }

        try {
            // Ensure styles and script are injected
            ensureMentionHighlightStyles(doc);
            ensureMentionHighlightScript(doc);

            // Try to find element by selector
            let element = null;
            if (selector.startsWith('.') || selector.startsWith('#')) {
                element = doc.querySelector(selector);
            } else if (/^[A-Z0-9]+$/i.test(selector)) {
                element = doc.querySelector(selector.toLowerCase());
            }

            if (element && win.__showInspectTooltip) {
                // Scroll element into view
                element.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center', behavior: 'smooth' });

                // Show tooltip immediately (no need to clear first, __showInspectTooltip updates in place)
                win.__showInspectTooltip(element);

                mentionHighlightedElement = element;
            }
        } catch (e) {
            console.warn('[MyopAgent] Error highlighting selector:', selector, e);
        }
    }

    // ===========================================
    // Agent Client-Side Tools Registry
    // ===========================================
    // These tools allow the AI agent to perform actions in the component builder.
    // When the agent wants to execute a tool, the user must approve it first.

    const agentTools = {
        createTestScenario: {
            name: 'createTestScenario',
            description: 'Create a test data scenario for an input method. Test scenarios simulate how the host application would call this component with different data states - such as empty state (no items), error state, loading state, populated state (many items), or edge cases. This helps verify the component behaves correctly across all possible real-world situations.',
            params: {
                methodName: {
                    type: 'string',
                    required: true,
                    description: 'The input method name (e.g., "myop_init_interface")'
                },
                scenarioName: {
                    type: 'string',
                    required: true,
                    description: 'A descriptive name for this test scenario (e.g., "Empty Cart", "Loading State", "10+ Items")'
                },
                data: {
                    type: 'object',
                    required: true,
                    description: 'The test data object that simulates what the host app would send'
                }
            },
            handler: async ({ methodName, scenarioName, data }) => {
                // Find the input method
                const method = editorState.input_methods_cache.find(m => m.method_name === methodName);
                if (!method) {
                    return { success: false, error: `Input method "${methodName}" not found` };
                }

                // Initialize test_dtos array if needed
                if (!method.test_dtos) {
                    method.test_dtos = [];
                }

                // Create new test DTO
                const newDto = {
                    id: `dto_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 9)}`,
                    name: scenarioName,
                    data: data
                };

                // Add to method's test DTOs
                method.test_dtos.push(newDto);

                // Refresh the UI
                if (typeof _refreshTestDtoList === 'function') {
                    _refreshTestDtoList(methodName);
                }

                // Notify host to persist (use save_test_dto with isNew: true)
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    window.myop_cta_handler('save_test_dto', {
                        methodName: methodName,
                        dtoName: scenarioName,
                        isNew: true,
                        dtoData: data
                    });
                }

                // Show notification
                if (typeof _showNotification === 'function') {
                    _showNotification(`Test scenario "${scenarioName}" created`);
                }

                return { success: true, dtoId: newDto.id, scenarioName };
            }
        }
    };

    // Get list of available tools for the agent
    function getAvailableToolsList() {
        return Object.entries(agentTools).map(([name, tool]) => ({
            name,
            description: tool.description,
            params: tool.params || {},
            requiresApproval: tool.requiresApproval !== false // Default to true
        }));
    }

    // Execute a tool by name
    async function executeAgentTool(toolName, params = {}) {
        const tool = agentTools[toolName];
        if (!tool) {
            return { success: false, error: `Unknown tool: ${toolName}` };
        }

        try {
            const result = await tool.handler(params);
            return result;
        } catch (err) {
            console.error('[AgentTools] Error executing tool:', toolName, err);
            return { success: false, error: err.message };
        }
    }

    // Listen for messages from myop-agent iframe
    window.addEventListener('message', (event) => {
        // Debug: log all incoming messages
        console.log('[MyopAgent] Raw message received, origin:', event.origin, 'expected one of:', MYOP_AGENT_ORIGINS, 'data:', event.data?.type);

        // Only accept messages from our allowed iframe origins
        if (!MYOP_AGENT_ORIGINS.includes(event.origin)) {
            console.log('[MyopAgent] Ignoring message from different origin');
            return;
        }

        const message = event.data;
        if (!message || typeof message !== 'object' || !message.type) {
            return;
        }

        console.log('[MyopAgent] Received message:', message.type, message);

        switch (message.type) {
            case 'ready':
            case 'myop_agent_ready':
                console.log('[MyopAgent] Agent iframe is ready');
                // Mark as ready and show iframe
                if (window._myopAgentSetReady) window._myopAgentSetReady();
                if (window._myopAgentShowLoaded) window._myopAgentShowLoaded();
                break;
            case 'requestInit':
                console.log('[MyopAgent] Agent requesting init data');
                editorState._agentRequestedInit = true;
                _trySendAgentInit();
                break;
            case 'initAck':
                console.log('[MyopAgent] Init acknowledged:', message.success);
                break;
            case 'componentUpdated':
                console.log('[MyopAgent] Component updated by agent');
                handleComponentUpdate(message.payload);
                break;
            case 'componentAutoCreated':
                // Agent server auto-created a component to host assets
                // Update our state so subsequent saves update this component instead of creating a new one
                console.log('[MyopAgent] Component auto-created by server:', message.payload?.componentId);
                if (message.payload?.componentId) {
                    window.myop_cta_handler('component_auto_created', {
                        componentId: message.payload.componentId,
                        variantId: message.payload.variantId
                    });
                }
                break;
            case 'visualEditMode':
                console.log('[MyopAgent] Visual edit mode:', message.payload?.enabled);
                handleVisualEditMode(message.payload?.enabled);
                break;
            case 'myop_refresh_token':
                console.log('[MyopAgent] Token refresh requested');
                // Use CTA handler to notify dashboard to refresh the token
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    window.myop_cta_handler('refresh_token', {});
                } else {
                    console.warn('[MyopAgent] myop_cta_handler not defined, cannot refresh token');
                }
                break;
            case 'commandKeyState':
                console.log('[MyopAgent] Command key state from agent:', message.pressed);
                updateGlobalCommandState(message.pressed);
                break;
            case 'escKeyPressed':
                console.log('[MyopAgent] ESC key from agent, checking visual edit');
                if (isVisualEditEnabled()) {
                    console.log('[MyopAgent] Turning off visual edit mode');
                    setVisualEditEnabled(false);
                    handleVisualEditMode(false);
                }
                break;
            case 'highlightSelector':
                // Highlight element in preview when hovering selector in mentions menu
                highlightSelectorInPreview(message.payload?.selector);
                break;
            case 'getAvailableTools':
                // Agent requesting list of available client-side tools
                console.log('[MyopAgent] Sending available tools list');
                sendToMyopAgent({
                    type: 'availableTools',
                    tools: getAvailableToolsList()
                });
                break;
            case 'executeTool': {
                // Agent executing a client-side tool (already approved by user)
                const { requestId, tool: toolName, params: toolParams } = message.payload || {};
                console.log('[MyopAgent] Executing tool:', toolName, 'with params:', toolParams);

                executeAgentTool(toolName, toolParams).then(result => {
                    sendToMyopAgent({
                        type: 'toolResult',
                        requestId,
                        ...result
                    });
                });
                break;
            }
            case 'selectTestDto': {
                // Run a test DTO — tries saved DTO first, falls back to inline data
                const { scenarioName, methodName: dtoMethodName, data: inlineData } = message.payload || {};
                const mName = dtoMethodName || 'myop_init_interface';
                if (scenarioName) {
                    console.log('[MyopAgent] Selecting test scenario:', scenarioName);
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        // Try to run saved DTO by name
                        const method = editorState.input_methods_cache.find(m => m.method_name === mName);
                        const dto = method?.test_dtos?.find(d => d.name === scenarioName);
                        if (dto && typeof _runTestDto === 'function') {
                            _runTestDto(mName, scenarioName);
                        } else if (inlineData) {
                            // DTO not saved yet — run inline data directly
                            console.log('[MyopAgent] DTO not found, running inline data');
                            editorState.pendingDtoRun = { methodName: mName, dtoData: inlineData };
                            if (editorState.activeTab === 'split') {
                                window.renderPreview();
                            } else {
                                showTab('preview');
                            }
                        }
                    }, 100);
                } else if (inlineData) {
                    // No scenario name — just run inline data
                    console.log('[MyopAgent] Running inline test data');
                    editorState.pendingDtoRun = { methodName: mName, dtoData: inlineData };
                    if (editorState.activeTab === 'split') {
                        window.renderPreview();
                    } else {
                        showTab('preview');
                    }
                }
                break;
            }
            case 'runTestData': {
                // Run unsaved test data directly in preview (no persistence)
                const { methodName: runMethodName, data: runData } = message.payload || {};
                if (runData) {
                    console.log('[MyopAgent] Running test data directly');
                    const runMethod = runMethodName || 'myop_init_interface';
                    editorState.pendingDtoRun = { methodName: runMethod, dtoData: runData };
                    if (editorState.activeTab === 'split') {
                        window.renderPreview();
                    } else {
                        showTab('preview');
                    }
                }
                break;
            }
            case 'setComponentName': {
                // Agent suggesting a component name
                const { name: newComponentName } = message.payload || {};
                if (newComponentName && editorState.dom.componentNameDisplay) {
                    console.log('[MyopAgent] Setting component name:', newComponentName);
                    editorState.componentName = newComponentName;
                    editorState.dom.componentNameDisplay.value = newComponentName;
                    editorState.dom.componentNameDisplay.classList.remove('empty-state');
                    _updateButtonStates();
                    // Persist the name via CTA
                    if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                        const payload = safeClone({
                            component_id: editorState.componentId,
                            component_name: newComponentName
                        });
                        window.myop_cta_handler('update_component_name', payload);
                    }
                }
                break;
            }
            case 'requestSave': {
                // Agent requesting the component be saved (e.g., before asset upload)
                console.log('[MyopAgent] Save requested by agent, reason:', message.reason);
                if (typeof _onSave === 'function') {
                    _onSave();
                }
                break;
            }
            case 'copyToClipboard': {
                // Handle copy request from myop-agent (due to mixed content restrictions)
                const { text: textToCopy, requestId: copyRequestId } = message.payload || {};
                if (textToCopy && copyRequestId) {
                    navigator.clipboard.writeText(textToCopy).then(() => {
                        console.log('[MyopAgent] Text copied to clipboard');
                        sendToMyopAgent({
                            type: 'copyResult',
                            payload: { requestId: copyRequestId, success: true }
                        });
                    }).catch(err => {
                        console.error('[MyopAgent] Copy failed:', err);
                        sendToMyopAgent({
                            type: 'copyResult',
                            payload: { requestId: copyRequestId, success: false, error: err.message }
                        });
                    });
                }
                break;
            }
            case 'agentThinking': {
                // Forward agent thinking state to dashboard for favicon animation
                const { isThinking } = message.payload || {};
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    window.myop_cta_handler('agent_thinking', { isThinking });
                }
                break;
            }
            case 'navigate_to_billing': {
                // Forward billing navigation to dashboard
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    window.myop_cta_handler('navigate_to_billing', message.payload || {});
                }
                break;
            }
            default:
                console.log('[MyopAgent] Unknown message type:', message.type);
        }
    });

    // Initialize X-Ray module (from js/xray.js)
    if (window.xray) window.xray.init();

    // Initialize inspector module (from js/inspector.js)
    if (window.inspector) window.inspector.init();

    // Initialize visual edit module (from js/visual-edit.js)
    setupGlobalCommandTracking();
    setupVisualEditMessageListener(
        function(payload) {
            // Forward element selection to myop-agent iframe
            sendToMyopAgent({
                type: 'elementSelected',
                payload: payload
            });
            // Focus the myop-agent iframe so the prompt input can receive focus
            if (myopAgentIframe) {
                myopAgentIframe.focus();
            }
        },
        function() {
            // Notify myop-agent that visual edit was cancelled (so it resets button)
            sendToMyopAgent({
                type: 'visualEditCancelled'
            });
        }
    );

    // Handle component updates from myop-agent
    function handleComponentUpdate(payload) {
        if (!payload || !payload.componentHTML) {
            console.warn('[MyopAgent] No HTML in component update');
            return;
        }

        const newHTML = payload.componentHTML;
        console.log('[MyopAgent] Updating code editor with new HTML:', newHTML.length, 'chars');

        // In playground mode, always update code directly (no variant creation)
        const isPlayground = editorState.mode === 'playground';

        // In playground mode, if viewing readonly Production variant, switch to editable variant
        if (isPlayground && editorState.selectedVariant && editorState.selectedVariant.readonly === true) {
            console.log('[MyopAgent] Playground mode: switching from Production to editable variant');

            // Find the editable variant from versions
            const editableVariant = editorState.versions.find(v => v.readonly !== true);

            if (editableVariant) {
                // Switch to the editable variant
                editorState.selectedVariant = editableVariant;

                // Update UI to show editable variant is selected
                if (editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay) {
                    editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.value = editableVariant.name;
                }
                if (editorState.dom.variantDescriptionDisplay) {
                    editorState.dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.value = editableVariant.description || '';
                }

                // Apply empty-state class if variant name is untitled
                if (editableVariant.name === 'Untitled variant') {
                    editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.add('empty-state');
                } else {
                    editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.remove('empty-state');
                }

                // Refresh variant list to show new selection
                if (typeof _refreshVariantList === 'function') {
                    _refreshVariantList();
                }

                // Update editor readonly state (editable variant is not readonly)
                if (typeof _updateEditorReadOnlyState === 'function') {
                    _updateEditorReadOnlyState();
                }

                // NOTE: Do NOT notify host about variant switch here!
                // If we call version_selected, the host will send back OLD cached data and revert the agent's changes.
                // The agent update will be saved via save_code which handles the variant correctly.

                console.log('[MyopAgent] Switched to editable variant:', editableVariant.name);
            } else {
                console.warn('[MyopAgent] No editable variant found in playground mode');
            }
        }

        // Check if current variant is locked (has releases) - only applies to component mode
        // Check both editorState.releases AND the has_releases flag from versions array for robustness
        const selectedVersionHasReleases = editorState.selectedVariant &&
            editorState.versions.find(v => v.id === editorState.selectedVariant.id)?.has_releases;
        const hasReleases = !isPlayground && (
            (editorState.releases && editorState.releases.length > 0) ||
            selectedVersionHasReleases
        );

        if (hasReleases) {
            console.log('[MyopAgent] Variant is published (has releases), creating new variant for agent update');
            // Current variant is locked - create a new variant with the new code
            const originalName = editorState.selectedVariant ? editorState.selectedVariant.name : 'Variant';

            // Calculate new version number based on total variant count
            const nextNumber = editorState.versions.length + 1;
            const newVariantName = `Version ${nextNumber}`;

            // Create new variant with the agent's code
            // Use temporary ID format matching host (variant_timestamp_random) - will be replaced by server ID on save
            const newVariant = {
                id: `variant_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 9)}`,
                name: newVariantName,
                published: false,
                code: newHTML,
                description: `Created from AI agent update (based on ${originalName})`
            };

            // Add to versions array
            editorState.versions.push(newVariant);

            // Select the new variant
            editorState.selectedVariant = newVariant;
            editorState.releases = []; // New variant has no releases

            // Update UI
            if (editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay) {
                editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.value = newVariantName;
                editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.remove('empty-state');
                editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.setAttribute('contenteditable', 'false');
            }
            if (editorState.dom.variantDescriptionDisplay) {
                editorState.dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.value = newVariant.description;
            }

            // Update code editor with new code
            if (editorState.dom?.codeEditor) {
                editorState.dom.codeEditor.value = newHTML;
            }

            // Update editor read-only state (new variant is editable)
            if (typeof _updateEditorReadOnlyState === 'function') {
                _updateEditorReadOnlyState();
            }

            // Refresh variant list
            if (typeof _refreshVariantList === 'function') {
                _refreshVariantList();
            }

            // Mark as dirty so save button becomes active and host is notified
            if (typeof _markAsDirty === 'function') {
                _markAsDirty();
            }

            // Refresh the preview (keep active DTO applied)
            if (typeof _renderPreviewWithActiveDto === 'function') {
                _renderPreviewWithActiveDto();
            } else if (typeof window.renderPreview === 'function') {
                window.renderPreview();
            }

            console.log('[MyopAgent] Created new variant:', newVariantName, 'with ID:', newVariant.id);
            console.log('[MyopAgent] editorState.selectedVariant is now:', editorState.selectedVariant?.id);

            // Auto-save the new variant
            setTimeout(() => {
                console.log('[MyopAgent] Auto-save timeout fired, selectedVariant:', editorState.selectedVariant?.id);
                if (typeof _onSave === 'function') {
                    _onSave();
                    if (typeof _showNotification === 'function') {
                        _showNotification(`New variant "${newVariantName}" created and saved`);
                    }
                }
            }, 100);
        } else {
            // Current variant is editable - update code directly
            if (editorState.dom?.codeEditor) {
                editorState.dom.codeEditor.value = newHTML;

                // Mark as dirty so save button becomes active and host is notified
                if (typeof _markAsDirty === 'function') {
                    _markAsDirty();
                }

                // Refresh the preview (keep active DTO applied)
                if (typeof _renderPreviewWithActiveDto === 'function') {
                    _renderPreviewWithActiveDto();
                } else if (typeof window.renderPreview === 'function') {
                    window.renderPreview();
                }

                // Auto-save the changes
                setTimeout(() => {
                    if (typeof _onSave === 'function') {
                        _onSave();
                        if (typeof _showNotification === 'function') {
                            _showNotification('Component updated and saved');
                        }
                    }
                }, 100);
            }
        }
    }

    // Send component updates when code changes (debounced)
    let myopAgentUpdateTimeout = null;
    function notifyMyopAgentOfCodeChange() {
        console.log('[MyopAgent] Code change detected, scheduling update');
        if (myopAgentUpdateTimeout) {
            clearTimeout(myopAgentUpdateTimeout);
        }
        myopAgentUpdateTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
            // Get HTML from Monaco instance directly, fallback to editorState
            let componentHTML = '';
            if (typeof monacoEditorInstance !== 'undefined' && monacoEditorInstance) {
                componentHTML = monacoEditorInstance.getValue();
            } else if (editorState.dom?.codeEditor?.value !== undefined) {
                componentHTML = editorState.dom.codeEditor.value;
            }

            console.log('[MyopAgent] Sending updateComponent, HTML length:', componentHTML.length);
            sendToMyopAgent({
                type: 'updateComponent',
                payload: {
                    componentId: editorState.componentId || '',
                    componentName: editorState.componentName || '',
                    variantId: editorState.selectedVariant?.id || '',
                    variantName: editorState.selectedVariant?.name || '',
                    componentHTML: componentHTML
                }
            });
        }, 500); // Debounce 500ms
    }

    // Export to window for Monaco editor to call
    window.notifyMyopAgentOfCodeChange = notifyMyopAgentOfCodeChange;

    // Switch to a specific left panel tab (configuration or myop-agent)
    // Triggers click event to ensure proper initialization (e.g., agent iframe loading)
    function switchToLeftPanelTab(tabName) {
        // Find the tab element by ID (tab-configuration or tab-myop-agent)
        const targetTab = document.getElementById(`tab-${tabName}`);
        if (!targetTab) {
            console.warn('[App] Left panel tab not found:', tabName);
            return;
        }

        // Trigger click to run the full initialization logic
        targetTab.click();
        console.log('[App] Switched to left panel tab:', tabName);
    }

    // Export to window for external calls
    window.switchToLeftPanelTab = switchToLeftPanelTab;

</script>

</body>
<script id='myop_preview' type="myop_preview">

window.myop_init_interface({});
</script>

</html>
